summary_translated: 大语言模型日益作为工具使用型智能体运行，其中微小的格式、参数或函数调用错误即可使原本合理的响应失效。我们研究了推理阶段前馈网络（FFN）干预，以在不重训练模型权重的情况下改善结构化输出。项目始于正交残差投影（ORP），这是一种方向修正的修复尝试，揭示了敏感的SwiGLU FFN干预位置，但常造成比修复更大的损害。因此，我们提出幅度门控（AG），一种非破坏性替代方案，保留预训练FFN权重方向，仅在生成过程中调节激活幅度。我们定义了一个细粒度的干预系统，涵盖P1/P2/P3及分支特异性的P1s/P2a/P2b位置，并引入一种评估协议，将组合最优头空间与固定配置及学习门控分离，强制样本级核算，并使用任务感知指标评估二分类与部分得分数据集。在Qwen3.5-9B、Qwen3-8B和Qwen2.5-7B上，AG整体呈弱正向效果，但在工具结构化任务上表现最强。在Qwen3.5-9B上，类别级学习门控将工具/结构化/代理性能从38.66%提升至42.92%（+4.27个百分点），Hermes函数调用任务提升约+7.6点；在Qwen3-8B上，Hermes JSON模式提升+11.36点。Qwen2.5-7B保留最优头空间，但当前学习门控未能捕捉该潜力，表明部署需依赖模型与类别特定路由。熵AG与牛顿-舒尔茨窗口AG的对比显示，两类均无绝对主导优势。这些结果表明，工具结构化推理是安全FFN级推理优化最可信的首个目标，而未来在线验证与更广泛的跨模型评估仍有必要。

summary: A thematic corpus is a collection of semantically coherent documents that collectively describe different aspects of a shared thematic event. Such a corpus typically contains hundreds or even thousands of documents. While users' interests in a thematic event often span multiple dimensions, Query-Focused Summarization (QFS) aims to generate summaries tailored to users' queries. However, existing QFS datasets lack event-oriented summarization, and most QFS methods struggle with large-scale corpora. To address these challenges, we propose the Query-Focused Event Summarization (QFES) task and construct the QFESum dataset, which contains 8 thematic events, 16,684 documents, and 104 queries. Furthermore, we introduce a two-stage QFES framework consisting of Query-Focused Retrieval with Adaptive Thresholding (RAT) and Query-Focused Summarization based on Hierarchical Clustering (SHC). Experimental results on QFESum show that RAT and SHC consistently outperform the baselines, demonstrating their effectiveness for QFES. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/sarcasm-hcy02/QFES-QFESum.
title: Query-Focused Event Summarization: A Dataset and Benchmark
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures, and 13 tables. Dataset and code are available at this https URL
title_translated: 聚焦查询的事件摘要：一个数据集与基准
summary_translated: 主题语料库是一组语义连贯的文档集合，共同描述一个共享主题事件的不同方面。此类语料库通常包含数百甚至数千篇文档。尽管用户对某一主题事件的兴趣往往涵盖多个维度，但聚焦查询摘要（QFS）旨在生成符合用户查询的摘要。然而，现有QFS数据集缺乏面向事件的摘要，且大多数QFS方法难以处理大规模语料库。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了聚焦查询的事件摘要（QFES）任务，并构建了QFESum数据集，包含8个主题事件、16,684篇文档和104个查询。此外，我们提出一个两阶段QFES框架，包括自适应阈值查询聚焦检索（RAT）和基于层次聚类的查询聚焦摘要（SHC）。在QFESum上的实验结果表明，RAT和SHC持续优于基线方法，证明了其在QFES任务中的有效性。数据集与代码已公开于https://github.com/sarcasm-hcy02/QFES-QFESum。

summary: Large-scale pretrained ASR models such as Whisper exhibit strong multilingual capabilities. However, fine-tuning on low-resource languages often causes catastrophic forgetting. Although continual learning mitigates this issue, existing methods struggle to regulate cross-task interference in multilingual settings, where dominant languages bias optimization. We propose Unified Gradient Projection (UGP), which constrains parameter updates using reference gradients from language-balanced replay in a unified projection space. By equalizing per-language contributions in the projection, UGP reduces dominant-language bias and improves cross-lingual stability. We further show that combining gradient-level projection with data-level replay yields complementary gains in stability and plasticity. Across diverse low-resource language groups and model scales, UGP enables effective adaptation while substantially mitigating forgetting. On Whisper-large-v3, it achieves near-zero average forgetting.
title: Unified Gradient Projection: Language-Balanced Continual Learning for Multilingual Low-Resource ASR
title_translated: 统一梯度投影：多语言低资源语音识别的语言平衡持续学习
summary_translated: 大规模预训练语音识别模型（如Whisper）表现出强大的多语言能力。然而，在低资源语言上进行微调时常引发灾难性遗忘。尽管持续学习可缓解此问题，但现有方法在多语言环境中难以调控跨任务干扰，主导语言会偏向优化过程。我们提出统一梯度投影（UGP），通过语言平衡回放的参考梯度，在统一投影空间中约束参数更新。通过在投影空间中均衡各语言贡献，UGP减少了主导语言偏差，提升了跨语言稳定性。我们进一步证明，将梯度级投影与数据级回放结合，可在稳定性和可塑性上产生互补增益。在多种低资源语言组别和模型规模下，UGP实现了有效适应，同时显著减轻遗忘。在Whisper-large-v3上，其平均遗忘率接近零。

summary: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by letting a lightweight drafter propose multiple tokens that are verified by a larger target model. Although effective for text-only LLMs, speculative decoding yields limited gains in VLMs because drafters often diverge on vision-critical content, while existing multimodal acceleration methods do not directly address irrelevant visual evidence or optimize the verifier-accepted prefix length that governs speedup. We propose TIGER, a Text-conditioned vIsual GatEd Routing framework for multimodal speculative decoding. TIGER dynamically selects a sparse set of context-relevant visual tokens based on the drafter's current textual state, rather than expose the full visual token set or a fixed compressed interface. To better align training with inference-time efficiency, we optimize the drafter with acceptance-aligned group-based policy training using verifier-derived rewards based on accepted prefix length, built on top of distillation warm start with KL anchoring. This encourages the drafter not only to imitate the target model, but also to produce speculative continuations that survive verification for longer prefixes. Experiments show that TIGER yields consistent gains in accepted prefix length and speculative speedup under exact verifier-side speculative decoding, while achieving favorable quality-latency trade-offs with comparable downstream accuracy in visual-routing analyses.
title: TIGER: Text-Conditioned Visual Gated Routing with Acceptance Alignment for Multimodal Speculative Decoding
title_translated: TIGER：基于接受对齐的文本条件视觉门控路由用于多模态推测解码
summary_translated: 推测解码通过让轻量级草稿模型提出多个词元并由大型目标模型验证来加速自回归生成。尽管在纯文本大语言模型中有效，但在视觉语言模型（VLMs）中推测解码带来的增益有限，因为草稿模型常在视觉关键内容上产生分歧；而现有的多模态加速方法并未直接解决无关视觉证据问题，也未优化决定加速效果的验证器接受前缀长度。我们提出了TIGER，一种面向多模态推测解码的文本条件视觉门控路由框架。TIGER根据草稿模型当前的文本状态动态选择一组稀疏的相关视觉词元，而非暴露完整的视觉词元集或固定压缩接口。为更好地对齐训练与推理效率，我们采用基于验证器反馈奖励的接受对齐分组策略训练，该奖励基于接受前缀长度，并建立在KL锚定的蒸馏预热基础上。这促使草稿模型不仅模仿目标模型，还能生成更长前缀下仍能通过验证的推测延续。实验表明，在精确验证器侧推测解码下，TIGER在接受前缀长度和推测加速方面均表现出一致提升，同时在视觉路由分析中实现了良好的质量-延迟权衡，且下游准确率相当。

summary: Organizations and regulators increasingly consult large language models (LLMs) for regulatory-compliance questions, yet a wrong statutory citation can silently propagate into legal advice, compliance documentation, and policy decisions. We introduce a bilingual benchmark of 120 questions probing whether freely accessible LLMs fabricate article citations for two data-protection instruments: the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). The benchmark pairs direct citation retrieval questions with false premise verification probes and deliberately unanswerable "trap" questions -- including questions about a repealed article and about deadlines that exist only in implementing regulations, not in the law itself. Every question is posed in both Arabic and English, and all scoring is fully automatic against a manually verified gold reference. Evaluating three freely accessible models (Gemini 2.5 Flash, GPT-OSS-120B, Nemotron-3-Super-120B), we find a dramatic jurisdiction gap: near-ceiling citation accuracy on the GDPR (94-100% on direct retrieval) against majority fabrication on the Saudi PDPL (60-77%), invariant to query language; the highest fabrication rates (67%) arise from statute-vs-regulations confusion, and 91% of fabricated citations are asserted with confidence >= 0.8. Fabrication tracks the jurisdiction of the law, not the language of the query, and model confidence provides no protection -- indicating that verbatim-verification safeguards, rather than model self confidence, must gate any institutional reliance on LLMs for compliance screening.
title: Do LLMs Fabricate Legal Citations? A Bilingual Benchmark on Saudi Data Protection Law and the GDPR
comment: 5 pages, 3 tables. Benchmark data and model outputs to be released. Also archived at Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21320218
title_translated: 大语言模型会伪造法律引用吗？基于沙特数据保护法与GDPR的双语基准测试
summary_translated: 组织和监管机构越来越多地依赖大语言模型（LLMs）解答合规性问题，但错误的法律条文引用可能悄然传播至法律建议、合规文档和政策决策中。我们引入了一个包含120个问题的双语基准测试，用于探究自由可访问的大语言模型是否会对欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR）和沙特个人数据保护法（PDPL）的条文引用进行伪造。该基准测试结合了直接引用检索问题、虚假前提验证探针以及故意无法回答的“陷阱”问题——包括关于已被废止条文的问题，以及仅存在于实施条例中而非法律本身的有效截止日期问题。每个问题均以阿拉伯语和英语两种语言提出，所有评分均自动完成，依据人工验证的黄金标准。评估了三种免费可访问模型（Gemini 2.5 Flash、GPT-OSS-120B、Nemotron-3-Super-120B），发现显著的司法管辖差异：在GDPR上的引用准确率接近满分（直接检索达94%-100%），而在沙特PDPL上则多数存在伪造（60%-77%），且不受查询语言影响；最高的伪造率（67%）源于法律条文与法规之间的混淆，且91%的伪造引用被以≥0.8的置信度断言。伪造行为与法律所属司法管辖区相关，而非查询语言，且模型置信度无法提供保护——表明在机构依赖LLM进行合规筛查时，必须依赖逐字验证机制，而非模型自我信心。

summary: Large language models are increasingly used to assist scientific reading, but existing evaluation methods often fail to detect whether answers are supported by verifiable citations. We introduce ResearchQA, a benchmark of 6,211 single-paper question-answer pairs from 494 open-access papers spanning eight domains and four question types: lookup, comprehension, multi-hop, and adversarial. ResearchQA is designed for citation-grounded evaluation: it permits multiple valid supporting passages for a claim and rewards grounded refusal when the source paper does not support an answer. We evaluate eight leading closed- and open-weight models in a citation-grounded chat-with-paper setting using a deterministic citation matcher and an LLM-based rubric evaluator. Citation-based metrics separate systems more clearly than LLM-evaluator scores: section coverage and citation accuracy vary substantially across models, while evaluator scores remain tightly compressed. We further find that open-weight models approach the best closed-model citation accuracy while achieving 3 to 6 times lower per-example latency. We release the benchmark, evaluation harness, and evaluator prompt.
title: ResearchQA: Benchmarking Citation-Grounded Question-Answering on Scientific Papers
title_translated: ResearchQA：基于科学论文引文的问答任务基准测试
summary_translated: 大语言模型在辅助科学阅读方面的应用日益广泛，但现有评估方法往往无法检测答案是否由可验证的引文支持。我们提出了ResearchQA，一个涵盖494篇开放获取论文、共6,211个单篇论文问答对的基准测试，覆盖八个领域和四种问题类型：查找型、理解型、多跳型和对抗型。ResearchQA专为引文支撑评估设计：允许一个结论有多个有效支持段落，并在源论文不支持答案时奖励基于引文的拒绝回答。我们在引文支撑的“对话式读论文”设置中，使用确定性引文匹配器和基于LLM的评分评估器，对八种领先的闭源与开源模型进行了评估。基于引文的指标比LLM评分更能清晰地区分系统表现：不同模型在章节覆盖度和引文准确性方面差异显著，而评分器得分则高度集中。此外，我们发现开源模型在引文准确性上接近最佳闭源模型，同时实现每例低3至6倍的延迟。我们已发布该基准测试、评估工具包及评分提示。

summary: Modern large language models (LLMs) operate in interactive multi-turn settings, making multi-turn jailbreaking a realistic threat model and an important setting for automated red teaming. A core challenge in learning multi-turn jailbreak attackers is credit assignment: different turns contribute differently to the final outcome, yet existing learning signals are often too coarse to identify their individual contributions. We propose decomposed credit GRPO (DC-GRPO), a unified turn-level credit assignment framework for Group Relative Policy Optimization in multi-turn jailbreak learning. DC-GRPO assigns a separate group-relative learning signal to each turn by combining immediate and future credit, avoiding the credit misassignment induced by broadcasting a single trajectory-level score across the dialogue. We instantiate this framework with static and dynamic weighting rules that differ in how the two credit sources are balanced while sharing the same turn-level structure. Across multiple victim LLMs and benchmarks, the dynamic- and static-weighted variants achieve average ASR5@3 scores of 98.26% and 97.88%, respectively, substantially outperforming the state-of-the-art methods, including SEMA (86.58%) and TROJail (86.23%). Their consistently strong performance indicates that the central empirical benefit comes from turn-level group-relative credit assignment rather than a particular weighting rule. Warning: This paper contains examples of harmful content.
title: MJ: Multi-turn LLM Jailbreaking via Decomposed Credit Assignment
comment: 29 pages. Warning: This paper contains examples of harmful content
title_translated: MJ：通过分解信用分配实现多轮LLM越狱攻击
summary_translated: 现代大语言模型在交互式多轮场景中运行，使得多轮越狱攻击成为一个现实威胁模型，也是自动化红队测试的重要场景。多轮越狱攻击学习中的核心挑战是信用分配：不同轮次对最终结果的贡献不同，但现有学习信号往往过于粗略，难以识别各轮的具体贡献。我们提出了分解信用GRPO（DC-GRPO），一种统一的多轮越狱学习中组相对策略优化的轮次级信用分配框架。DC-GRPO通过结合即时信用与未来信用，为每一轮分配独立的组相对学习信号，避免将单一轨迹级分数广播至整个对话所导致的信用误分配。我们实例化该框架，采用静态与动态加权规则，两者在两种信用来源的平衡方式上有所不同，但共享相同的轮次级结构。在多个目标LLM和基准测试中，动态与静态加权变体分别达到平均ASR5@3分数98.26%和97.88%，显著优于现有最先进方法（如SEMA 86.58% 和 TROJail 86.23%）。其持续优异的表现表明，核心实证优势来自轮次级组相对信用分配，而非特定加权规则。警告：本文包含有害内容示例。

summary: Fruitful collaborations rely on cooperative communications, including of contextual cues to incorporate into reasoning. The increasing use of LLMs in collaborative and agentic pipelines raises questions about the extent to which they exhibit these pragmatic capabilities, especially in scenarios where they may not have access to the same information as their collaborators. In this paper, we perform a novel investigation into the pragmatic reasoning capabilities of LLMs in a multi-party collaborative task under partial information conditions. We formalize a notion of collaborative epistemic asymmetry that explicitly connects objective task success to Grice's cooperative principle and empirically assess various LLMs' abilities to act cooperatively as both speakers and listeners, including both prompting and post-training strategies. Our results show that while LLMs exhibit certain pragmatic capabilities in collaborative settings, and these can be elicited through prompting and post-training, they still face challenges in pragmatic communication with incomplete information, and that certain failure modes do correlate with floutings of Grice's maxims that go unrecognized.
title: Flout at Your Own Risk: LLMs Struggle with Pragmatic Cooperativity Under Epistemic Asymmetry
title_translated: 自担风险地违反合作原则：LLM在认知不对称下的语用合作能力受限
summary_translated: 富有成效的合作依赖于合作性沟通，包括将上下文线索纳入推理过程。随着LLM在协作与代理流程中的广泛应用，人们开始质疑它们在信息不对称场景下是否具备这些语用能力，尤其是在它们无法获得与合作者相同信息的情况下。本文首次在部分信息条件下，对LLM在多方协作任务中的语用推理能力进行了深入研究。我们形式化了“协作认知不对称”的概念，明确将客观任务成功与Grice的合作原则相联系，并通过实证评估多种LLM在作为说话者和听者时的合作能力，涵盖提示工程与后训练策略。结果表明，尽管LLM在协作环境中展现出一定的语用能力，且可通过提示和后训练激发，但在信息不完整时仍面临语用沟通挑战，某些失败模式与未被识别的Grice准则违背行为相关。

summary: We used a large language model (GPT-4.1) to annotate the text of about 9,000 support conversations at a global consumer-goods firm, decomposing customer-care satisfaction into component axes (overall, agent, outcome, product, and customer effort), and validated the LLM annotations against the satisfaction ratings customers gave themselves. Four of five axes track self-reported satisfaction closely (overall, agent, and outcome near an unadjusted 0.65; effort -0.54), while product satisfaction is weak against the available proxy. The unadjusted correlation also understates the alignment: the disagreements concentrate in a small, readable tail of divergent sessions rather than in general drift, and the overall correlation rises to 0.811 when only the severe divergences are excluded and to 0.914 when the full divergent tail is excluded. The axes are also highly collinear, and adding them to the overall score does not improve prediction of the customer's rating, the decomposition's value is not incremental prediction but attribution and coverage. And, with greater coverage the picture of the data changes. Read on every contact rather than the few that return a survey, satisfaction is markedly lower than the survey reports (a full-census 2.91 against the surveyed 3.62 on a five-point scale). The promise of decomposed satisfaction as a methodology is the ability to identify more nuanced drivers of customer experience in conversational data.
title: Dimensionality in Satisfaction Ratings
title_translated: 满意度评分中的维度分析
summary_translated: 我们使用大型语言模型（GPT-4.1）对一家全球消费品公司的约9000条客服对话文本进行标注，将客户满意度分解为五个维度（总体、客服人员、结果、产品和客户努力程度），并验证了LLM标注与客户自评满意度的一致性。其中四个维度与自评满意度高度相关（总体、客服人员和结果接近未调整的0.65；努力程度为-0.54），而产品满意度与现有代理指标关联较弱。未调整的相关性低估了实际一致性：分歧主要集中在少数可读的异常会话尾部，而非普遍漂移；当排除严重分歧后，总体相关性上升至0.811，若排除全部分歧尾部则达到0.914。这些维度之间高度共线，将它们加入总体评分并未提升对客户评分的预测能力，其价值不在于增量预测，而在于归因分析与覆盖范围。随着覆盖范围扩大，数据图景发生显著变化：若阅读每一条客户接触记录而非仅调查返回的少数样本，满意度明显低于调查报告（五分制下全量普查得分为2.91，调查样本得分为3.62）。分解式满意度作为方法论的潜力在于能够从对话数据中识别出更细微的客户体验驱动因素。

summary: Continual learning promises a language model that keeps acquiring knowledge after training, with each new fact written into its weights. Whether weight writes can support accumulation remains undecided. We follow invented facts written into Qwen3 models from creation through sequences of twenty to one hundred later writes, using held-out questions of five types, with the original model given the fact in its prompt as the reference. Across these experiments, the breadth of the training data determines the kind of knowledge created. Bare-statement training produces recitation, while diverse restatements reduce the recitation-to-use gap from 27.4 to 5.4 points without showing the model a conclusion. This difference carries into later writes: after twenty sequential writes, bare-statement facts retain 1% accuracy while facts written from broad study data retain 46%. We also find that facts can be behaviourally forgotten without being erased. Forgotten facts keep most of the log-probability added by their write, and under bare-statement training 70% of wrong answers about them contain the most recently written fact. The same writes barely degrade the model's use of facts in context, and a forgotten study fact supplied in the prompt recovers to 77-80% on its questions. These results describe knowledge that is stored but question-keyed: later writes redirect the questions that reached it. Damage to unrelated abilities tracks KL divergence from the original model, and the later writes cause interference regardless of how the earlier fact was stored. Broad data can create usable knowledge, and a frozen reference can preserve capability, but no intervention we tested, including those built on accurate local measurements of each write, keeps earlier facts reachable. When facts must be composed or survive later writes, the reliable channel is context rather than the weights.
title: Can a Language Model Learn Facts Continually in Its Weights?
title_translated: 语言模型能否在其权重中持续学习事实？
summary_translated: 持续学习承诺让语言模型在训练后仍能不断积累知识，每个新事实都写入其权重中。然而，权重写入是否支持知识累积仍无定论。我们追踪了Qwen3模型从创建开始，经过二十到一百次后续写入所记录的虚构事实，使用五种类型的问题进行保留测试，以原始模型在提示中给出该事实作为参考。实验表明，训练数据的广度决定了所生成知识的类型：仅陈述式训练产生复述行为，而多样化的重述方式可在未向模型展示结论的情况下将复述与使用之间的差距从27.4点降至5.4点。这一差异延续至后续写入：经过二十次连续写入后，仅陈述式事实的准确率仅剩1%，而基于广泛研究数据写入的事实仍保持46%的准确率。我们还发现，事实可以被行为性遗忘但未被删除：遗忘的事实仍保留其写入时添加的大部分对数概率，且在仅陈述式训练下，关于这些事实的错误回答中有70%包含最近写入的事实。相同的写入对模型在上下文中使用事实的能力影响极小，且当一个被遗忘的研究事实出现在提示中时，其问题回答准确率可恢复至77%-80%。这些结果描述了一种存储但以问题为键的知识机制：后续写入会重新定向指向该知识的问题。无关能力的退化与原始模型的KL散度相关，且后续写入无论早期事实如何存储都会造成干扰。广泛数据可生成可用知识，冻结参考模型可维持能力，但我们在测试的所有干预措施（包括基于每次写入精确局部测量的方案）均无法保证早期事实的可访问性。当事实必须被组合或需经受后续写入考验时，可靠的通道是上下文而非权重本身。

summary: Conventional language-model distillation often relies on fixed teacher-generated data, which may not cover the states encountered by an evolving student policy. On-policy distillation (OPD) instead collects teacher or evaluator supervision on student-generated rollouts. However, existing OPD methods differ substantially in supervision form, tokenizer compatibility, teacher access, and supervision granularity, leading to fragmented implementations that are difficult to reproduce and extend. We present \textsc{EasyOPD}, an on-policy distillation framework built on verl, a distributed reinforcement-learning framework for large language models. \textsc{EasyOPD} separates user-side configuration, method-specific supervision logic, and verl-based execution. Its method modules connect to the shared backend through extension boundaries for loss construction, rollout metadata, reward processing, tokenizer alignment, and teacher-side computation. We instantiate representative methods for three OPD settings -- cross-tokenizer OPD, on-policy self-distillation, and step-wise OPD. Experiments on reasoning, code-generation, scientific-knowledge, and tool-use benchmarks show that these implementations can be executed through the same verl-based backend while retaining their method-specific objectives and task-dependent performance profiles. We release \textsc{EasyOPD} with runnable YAML configurations, documentation, and an installable demonstration package and video.
title: EasyOPD: An Easy-to-use On-Policy Distillation Framework for Large Language Models
title_translated: EasyOPD：一种面向大语言模型的简易在线策略蒸馏框架
summary_translated: 传统语言模型蒸馏通常依赖固定的教师生成数据，可能无法覆盖演进的学生策略遇到的状态。在线策略蒸馏（OPD）则通过学生生成的轨迹收集教师或评估器的监督信号。然而，现有OPD方法在监督形式、分词器兼容性、教师访问方式和监督粒度方面存在显著差异，导致实现碎片化，难以复现和扩展。我们提出 	extsc{EasyOPD}，一个基于 verl（用于大语言模型的分布式强化学习框架）构建的在线策略蒸馏框架。	extsc{EasyOPD} 将用户配置、方法特定的监督逻辑与verl基础执行分离。其方法模块通过扩展边界连接共享后端，支持损失构建、轨迹元数据、奖励处理、分词器对齐和教师侧计算。我们实现了三种OPD设置的代表性方法——跨分词器OPD、在线自蒸馏和逐步OPD。在推理、代码生成、科学知识和工具使用基准上的实验表明，这些实现可通过同一verl后端运行，同时保留各自的方法目标和任务依赖性能特征。我们发布了 	extsc{EasyOPD}，包含可运行的YAML配置、文档以及可安装的演示包和视频。

summary: In the age of large language models, Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) translation remains an open problem with many useful applications. We explore interactions between several NL2SQL pipeline extensions to inspire development of more lightweight models. Specifically, we integrate the NatSQL intermediate representation, include a preprocessing step and a fine-tuning step based on synthetic data, and develop a novel reranker model to improve SQL selection in the final beam. We perform an ablation study supplemented by a Shapley analysis of these different components integrated with two backbone architectures, SmBoP and RASAT. We find that simply combining all of them does not lead to best results, but that their impact depends on their interactions with the baseline system, as well as each other.
title: The Nuts and Bolts of Natural Language to SQL Translation: A Systematic Analysis of Model Pipeline Optimisation Approaches and their Interactions
title_translated: 自然语言转SQL翻译的底层机制：模型流水线优化方法及其交互作用的系统分析
summary_translated: 在大语言模型时代，自然语言转SQL（NL2SQL）翻译仍是开放性问题，具有广泛的应用价值。我们探讨了多个NL2SQL流水线扩展组件之间的相互作用，以启发更轻量级模型的开发。具体而言，我们集成了NatSQL中间表示，引入预处理步骤和基于合成数据的微调步骤，并开发了一种新型重排序模型以改进最终束搜索中的SQL选择。我们对两种主干架构（SmBoP和RASAT）进行了消融研究，并辅以Shapley值分析，揭示了各组件之间的交互效应。研究发现，简单地组合所有组件并不能带来最佳效果，其影响取决于与基线系统的相互作用以及彼此之间的协同关系。

summary: Frontier language models are increasingly evaluated on biomedical benchmarks, but two problems undermine most published evaluations: legacy benchmarks are near-saturated, and open-ended responses are graded by other language models. We evaluate Claude Fable 5, Anthropic's most capable publicly available model, across eight biomedical benchmarks, four text and four multimodal, using deterministic scoring against fixed answer keys throughout. We include two Claude predecessors and GPT-5 as baselines. Refusal is tracked as a distinct outcome in every result table. That decision produces the paper's central finding. Fable 5 refuses between 8.0% and 99.4% of questions depending on the benchmark, a pattern absent in both predecessors and in GPT-5. Once refused items are excluded from the denominator, Fable 5's accuracy exceeds or meets every other model on every benchmark in this study. We identify two distinguishable refusal patterns: one concentrating in basic-science and mechanism content across MedQA and MedXpertQA MM, confirmed independently on two benchmarks using each benchmark's own category labels; and a separate disease-domain pattern on RareBench, where inborn metabolic disease presentations are refused near-universally while adult-onset autoimmune presentations are not. The primary constraint on Fable 5's biomedical usefulness is willingness to engage, not capability once it does.
title: Capabilities of Claude Fable 5 on Biomedical Challenge Problems
comment: 15 pages, 6 tables, 4 figures, appendix with qualitative examples
title_translated: Claude Fable 5在生物医学挑战问题上的能力表现
summary_translated: 前沿语言模型正越来越多地在生物医学基准上进行评估，但大多数已发表评估面临两个问题：旧有基准已接近饱和，且开放式回答由其他语言模型评分。我们对Anthropic最先进公开模型Claude Fable 5在八个生物医学基准上的表现进行了评估，涵盖四类文本型和四类多模态基准，全程采用确定性评分与固定答案键对比。我们纳入了两个Claude前代模型和GPT-5作为基线。拒绝回答被单独记录在每一结果表中。这一决策成为本文核心发现。Fable 5在不同基准上的拒绝率介于8.0%至99.4%之间，这一模式在两个前代模型及GPT-5中均不存在。一旦排除拒绝项，Fable 5在本研究所有基准上的准确率均超过或持平于其他模型。我们识别出两种可区分的拒绝模式：一种集中于MedQA和MedXpertQA MM中的基础科学与机制内容，通过两个基准各自的类别标签独立验证；另一种为RareBench上的疾病领域模式，先天代谢性疾病表现几乎全部被拒绝，而成人起病的自身免疫性疾病表现则未被拒绝。Fable 5在生物医学应用中的主要限制并非能力，而是其参与意愿。

summary: Computational social science increasingly relies on automated preprocessing pipelines -- speaker diarization, ASR transcript cleaning, sentence segmentation -- to convert raw media into analyzable text. When these pipelines produce different outputs from the same input, two distinct sources of instability can arise: the preprocessing pipeline itself (diarization method, segmentation rules) and the downstream measurement instrument (LLM annotation vs.\ keyword lexicon). Using 256 YouTube interviews across 41 public figures from five domains, we compare two speaker-diarization pipelines and two measurement methods, all targeting the coupling between affective valence and epistemic modality. We find that (1) preprocessing pipeline sensitivity is concentrated in speakers with limited video samples (N $\leq 5$); for the four best-sampled speakers (N $\geq 16$), the mean absolute pipeline-induced change in $r(\text{neg}, \text{emph})$ is only $0.13$; (2) cross-method disagreement is larger and more systematic -- the LLM and keyword-lexicon methods assign opposite coupling directions to several well-sampled speakers, even within the same preprocessing pipeline; and (3) aggregate valence proportions are highly stable ($|Δp(\text{neg})| < 6$pp) regardless of pipeline or method, masking both sources of instability. The contribution is a diagnostic framework that separates pipeline effects from measurement effects: researchers studying cross-dimensional relationships in interview data should verify that their conclusions are robust to both sources of variation, with particular attention to measurement method choice.
title: Quantifying the Sources of Instability in LLM-Based Stance Analysis of Public Discourse
title_translated: 量化基于大语言模型的公众话语立场分析中的不稳定性来源
summary_translated: 计算社会科学越来越多地依赖自动化预处理流程——说话人辨识、语音识别转录清洗、句子分割——将原始媒体内容转化为可分析的文本。当这些流程对同一输入产生不同输出时，会引发两种不同的不稳定性来源：预处理流程本身（如辨识方法、分段规则）和下游测量工具（大语言模型标注 vs. 关键词词典）。我们以5个领域中41位公众人物的256个YouTube访谈为例，比较了两种说话人辨识流程和两种测量方法，均聚焦于情感极性与认识模态之间的耦合关系。研究发现：(1) 预处理流程的敏感性主要集中在视频样本较少的说话人（N ≤ 5）；对于四个样本量最多的说话人（N ≥ 16），平均绝对管道诱导的r(负向, 强调)变化仅为0.13；(2) 不同方法间的分歧更大且更具系统性——即使在相同预处理流程下，LLM方法与关键词词典方法也对多位样本充足的说话人赋予相反的耦合方向；(3) 情感比例的总体分布高度稳定（|Δp(负向)| < 6pp），掩盖了这两种不稳定性来源。本研究贡献了一个诊断框架，能够区分流程效应与测量效应：研究访谈数据中跨维度关系的研究者应验证其结论对这两种变异来源的稳健性，尤其需关注测量方法的选择。

summary: Opinionated text - spanning product reviews, hotel feedback, and social posts - captures rich signals about user experiences, preferences, and concerns. However, the scale, redundancy, and imbalance of such corpora make it challenging to analyze opinions effectively, particularly when the goal is to generate summaries that remain faithful to the diversity of viewpoints expressed. This paper presents a framework that preserves semantics in LLM-based opinion summarization while minimizing token usage. We combine multidimensional classification (e.g., sentiment, topics) with a family of stratified sampling strategies to select compact yet representative subsets of opinions before prompting the LLM. Tailored prompts then produce balanced summaries that surface the salient aspects expressed in the opinions (e.g., strengths and weaknesses of products/hotels). Experiments on Amazon product reviews, Tripadvisor hotel reviews, and X/Twitter posts demonstrate that our method significantly reduces token usage and computational cost while consistently outperforming traditional AI-based and standard LLM summarization baselines in terms of content coverage, balance, and semantic preservation.
title: Large Language Models for Token-Efficient and Semantic-Preserving Opinion Summarization
title_translated: 用于高效且语义保持的舆论摘要的大语言模型
summary_translated: 带有观点的文本——涵盖产品评论、酒店反馈和社交帖子——蕴含丰富的用户经验、偏好和关切信号。然而，这类语料库规模庞大、冗余且不平衡，使得有效分析观点变得困难，尤其是在目标是生成忠实反映观点多样性的摘要时。本文提出一种框架，在基于大语言模型的舆论摘要中保持语义的同时最小化token使用量。我们结合多维分类（如情感、主题）与一系列分层采样策略，在提示大语言模型前选择紧凑但具有代表性的观点子集。定制化的提示随后生成平衡的摘要，突出表达出的观点中的关键方面（如产品或酒店的优点与缺点）。在亚马逊产品评论、Tripadvisor酒店评论和X/Twitter帖子上的实验表明，该方法显著降低了token使用量和计算成本，同时在内容覆盖率、平衡性和语义保持方面持续优于传统的AI基摘要和标准大语言模型摘要基线。

summary: Quantifying abstractiveness in generated summaries is essential for evaluating summarization models beyond   surface-level metrics like ROUGE. We introduce Reference Abstraction (RA), Summary Abstraction (SA), and Abstraction   Ratio (AR) -- a set of principled heuristic metrics that measure how much a summary diverges from extractive copying   of the source text. The formulation uses the harmonic mean of document lengths modulated by a cubic non-overlap   factor, yielding dimensionally consistent, bounded output with non-linear sensitivity to the extractive-abstractive   boundary. Evaluation on 100 XSUM documents across four summarization models (BART-large-cnn, Pegasus-xsum, DistilBart,   MT5-small) demonstrates that the metrics successfully discriminate between extractive models (SA ~ 0.12-0.26) and   abstractive models (SA ~ 0.96-1.77), and that the Abstraction Ratio identifies summaries requiring manual evaluation   for potential hallucination. Code and results are available at https://github.com/katweNLP/AbstractionStudy.
title: Abstractiveness Metrics for Evaluating Text Summarization: A Refined Formulation with Empirical Validation
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, code at this https URL . Extended and revised version of: Katwe et al., IEEE OCIT 2022 (doi: https://doi.org/10.1109/OCIT56763.2022.00022 )
title_translated: 评估文本摘要的抽象性度量：一种经过实证验证的改进公式
summary_translated: 量化生成摘要的抽象性对于超越ROUGE等表面指标评估摘要模型至关重要。我们提出了参考抽象性（RA）、摘要抽象性（SA）和抽象比率（AR）——一组基于原理的启发式度量，用于衡量摘要与源文本提取式复制之间的偏离程度。该公式采用文档长度的调和平均值，并通过三次非重叠因子进行调节，得到维度一致、有界且对提取-抽象边界具有非线性敏感度的输出。在四个摘要模型（BART-large-cnn、Pegasus-xsum、DistilBart、MT5-small）的100个XSUM文档上进行评估，结果表明这些度量能有效区分提取式模型（SA ~ 0.12–0.26）与抽象式模型（SA ~ 0.96–1.77），且抽象比率能识别出需要人工评估以检测潜在幻觉的摘要。代码与结果可在https://github.com/katweNLP/AbstractionStudy获取。

summary: On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for enhancing and aligning Large Language Models (LLMs). However, in complex reasoning tasks, OPSD paradoxically degrades downstream performance. In this paper, we systematically investigate this pathology and identify a severe optimization trap we define as \textbf{Thinking Collapse} -- a sharp decline in the model's native intermediate reasoning behavior, measured by epistemic-token density (ET per 1k). Through entropy-based gradient masking and token-level target analysis, we show that this collapse is triggered by aggressive teacher gradients at high-student-entropy decision forks, where student epistemic tokens are frequently suppressed into teacher non-epistemic targets and are highly concentrated in high pointwise student-teacher divergence regions. To resolve this optimization pathology, we propose \textbf{Adaptive Dual-Perspective OPSD (AD-OPSD)}, a robust control framework that dynamically moderates the self-distillation objective. AD-OPSD selectively anchors high-suppression-risk sandboxed tokens to a reference prior derived from the frozen base model via an asymmetrical pointwise divergence gate, preserving native thinking capacity while retaining OPSD's error-correcting power. Extensive experiments across competitive mathematical benchmarks show that AD-OPSD improves over standard OPSD by up to \textbf{+4.1\%} absolute average accuracy across diverse model scales and datasets. Further analysis demonstrates that AD-OPSD mitigates thinking collapse and generalizes robustly to different post-training paradigms.
title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Thinking Collapse in On-Policy Self-Distillation
title_translated: 诊断并缓解在线策略自蒸馏中的思维坍塌现象
summary_translated: 在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）已成为提升和对齐大语言模型（LLMs）的关键范式。然而，在复杂推理任务中，OPSD反而会降低下游性能。本文系统性地研究这一病理现象，并识别出一种我们定义为“思维坍塌”的严重优化陷阱——即模型原生中间推理行为的急剧下降，以每千token的信念型token密度（ET per 1k）衡量。通过基于熵的梯度掩码和token级目标分析，我们发现这种坍塌是由高学生熵决策分支处的激进教师梯度触发的，此时学生信念型token频繁被抑制至教师非信念型目标，并高度集中于学生-教师点对点差异较大的区域。为解决这一优化问题，我们提出自适应双视角OPSD（AD-OPSD），一种鲁棒的控制框架，可动态调节自蒸馏目标。AD-OPSD通过不对称点对点差异门，将高抑制风险的沙盒token选择性锚定到由冻结基础模型导出的参考先验，从而在保留OPSD纠错能力的同时，维持模型的原生思维能力。在多个竞争性数学基准上的大量实验表明，AD-OPSD相较于标准OPSD在不同模型规模和数据集上平均准确率最高提升达+4.1%。进一步分析显示，AD-OPSD有效缓解了思维坍塌，并在不同后训练范式中表现出良好的泛化能力。

summary: Multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often evaluated with clean evidence, yet real retrieval can return topically relevant but unreliable content: false text and misleading images from corrupted metadata, entity swaps, typographic overlays, semantic edits, adversarial patches, blends, or style transfer. We introduce QIMG-7, a controlled benchmark for multimodal retrieval pollution in multi-sentence factual QA, spanning four datasets, seven image-attack families, and 16 paired clean/polluted regimes, for 1,760 evaluation rows per method. Across four generator/gate stacks, naive multimodal fusion is brittle: in the main gpt-4o-mini stack, Full-MM support drops from 0.908 with clean text to 0.490 with polluted text, often making Parametric fallback safer than retrieval. We propose source-aware trust resolution (SATR), a training-free approach that compares Parametric, Text-only, and Full-MM candidate answers and selects among candidate answers or falls back based on source reliability. The Field-Selector variant achieves the best balanced score, 0.816, improving over Full-MM by 11.7 points and over the Cascaded Router by 2.7 points. Ablations show that, in this text-first setting, explicit text-reliability modeling is the dominant driver of these gains. Overall, in text-first factual QA with multimodal retrieval conflict, our results support selective trust rather than unconditional fusion. Artifacts are available at https://github.com/SaadElDine/Trust_Before_Fusion.
title: Trust Before Fusion: QIMG-7 and Source-Aware Resolution for Polluted Multimodal RAG
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, 23 tables. Preprint under review
title_translated: 信任优先融合：QIMG-7与面向来源的污染多模态RAG解决方案
summary_translated: 多模态检索增强生成（RAG）通常在干净证据下进行评估，但实际检索可能返回主题相关但不可靠的内容：来自损坏元数据、实体替换、拼写叠加、语义编辑、对抗性补丁、混合或风格迁移的虚假文本和误导性图像。我们引入QIMG-7，一个针对多句事实问答中多模态检索污染的受控基准，涵盖四个数据集、七类图像攻击和16种成对的清洁/污染场景，每种方法共1,760个评估行。在四个生成器/门控堆栈中，朴素的多模态融合表现脆弱：在主要的gpt-4o-mini堆栈中，全模态支持从清洁文本下的0.908降至污染文本下的0.490，常导致参数化回退比检索更安全。我们提出源感知信任解析（SATR），一种无需训练的方法，通过比较参数化、仅文本和全模态候选答案，根据来源可靠性选择候选答案或回退。Field-Selector变体取得最佳平衡得分0.816，相比全模态提升11.7分，相比级联路由器提升2.7分。消融实验表明，在此以文本为主的设定下，显式的文本可靠性建模是取得这些提升的主要驱动因素。总体而言，在以文本为主的事实问答中存在多模态检索冲突时，我们的结果支持选择性信任而非无条件融合。相关成果可在https://github.com/SaadElDine/Trust_Before_Fusion获取。

summary: This paper describes the first ChineseBabyLM challenge, which will be held in the 2026 NLPCC conference. The challenge calls for researchers to train language models from scratch with 100 million Chinese tokens and evaluates the models on 3 tracks of tasks: NLU, cognitive alignment and Hanzi knowledge. There is no restriction on tokenizer, model architecture and the number of training epochs. Details of the challenge can be found in https://chinese-babylm.github.io/.
title: The First ChineseBabyLM Challenge: training data-efficient and cognitively plausible language models for Chinese
title_translated: 首届中文BabyLM挑战赛：训练数据高效且认知合理的中文语言模型
summary_translated: 本文介绍了将于2026年NLPCC会议上举办的首届中文BabyLM挑战赛。该挑战要求研究人员仅使用1亿个中文词元从零开始训练语言模型，并在三个任务赛道上评估模型表现：自然语言理解（NLU）、认知一致性以及汉字知识。对分词器、模型架构和训练轮次数量无任何限制。挑战详情可访问 https://chinese-babylm.github.io/。

summary: Persuasion techniques are powerful rhetorical devices used to sway public opinion in a wide range of media. We present a new corpus of persuasion techniques, focusing on Slavic languages. The corpus contains documents in Bulgarian, Polish, and Russian, annotated with persuasion techniques at the coarse-grained text-span level and fine-grained sentence level. The techniques are drawn from a taxonomy of 25 fine-grained persuasion techniques, grouped under six broad categories of rhetorical persuasion strategies. The corpus contains approximately 7500 text spans from 222 documents that cover topics hotly debated at the national and international levels. We describe the corpus creation process, provide detailed statistics, and examine correlations between topics and persuasion techniques. We use classic ML-based and generative AI-based models to provide baselines and benchmark results for the detection and classification of persuasion techniques at the text-span level and sentence level.
title: A Corpus of Persuasion Techniques in Slavic Languages
comment: Corpus used for SlavicNLP 2025 Workshop co-located with ACL 2025, Published at LREC 2026
title_translated: 斯拉夫语 persuasion 技术语料库
summary_translated: 说服技巧是广泛应用于各类媒体中影响公众舆论的强大修辞手段。本文介绍了一个新的斯拉夫语说服技巧语料库，涵盖保加利亚语、波兰语和俄语。该语料库包含222篇文档，共约7500个文本片段，标注了粗粒度的文本段落级和细粒度的句子级说服技巧。这些技巧源自一个包含25种细粒度说服策略的分类体系，归类于六种广泛的修辞说服策略类别。语料覆盖了国内外高度争议的话题。我们详细描述了语料构建过程，提供了统计数据，并分析了话题与说服技巧之间的相关性。我们采用经典机器学习模型和生成式AI模型作为基线，为文本片段级和句子级的说服技巧检测与分类提供基准结果。

summary: Speculative decoding has significantly accelerated Large Language Model (LLM) inference by alleviating memory-bound bottlenecks. However, traditional speculative decoding typically relies on auxiliary draft modules, incurring significant training and communication overhead. Although recent methods attempt to generate drafts within the target model itself, they often fail to fully exploit its latent parallel capacity due to a lack of structural coordination. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Progressive Tree Drafting (PTD)}, which employs a structured, guided parallel drafting strategy to harness the model's parallel potential. By coupling a progressive tree structure with a stepwise pruning mechanism, PTD actively guides the LLM to explore multiple semantic paths in a single forward pass, ensuring both draft diversity and coherence. Experiments demonstrate that PTD achieves up to $2\times$ decoding speedup across various benchmarks while remaining training-free and model-agnostic. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MINE-USTC/PTD.
title: Unlocking Parallelism in Autoregressive Language Models via Speculative Decoding with Progressive Tree Drafting
title_translated: 通过渐进式树草稿实现自回归语言模型中的并行性解锁
summary_translated: 推测解码显著加速了大语言模型（LLM）的推理过程，缓解了内存瓶颈问题。然而，传统的推测解码通常依赖辅助草稿模块，带来显著的训练和通信开销。尽管近期方法尝试在目标模型内部生成草稿，但由于缺乏结构化协调，往往未能充分挖掘其潜在的并行能力。本文提出 	extbf{渐进式树草稿（PTD）}，采用一种结构化、引导式的并行草稿策略，以激发模型的并行潜力。通过将渐进式树结构与逐步剪枝机制相结合，PTD 能够在单次前向传播中主动引导LLM探索多个语义路径，确保草稿的多样性与连贯性。实验表明，PTD 在多个基准测试中实现了高达2倍的解码加速，同时保持无需训练且模型无关。代码已开源：https://github.com/MINE-USTC/PTD。

summary: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into K-12 and higher education has outpaced the development of reliable methods for evaluating their pedagogical quality. As the research community starts to explore the space of automating evaluation of AI tutors, we introduce FATE (FLC AI Tutor Evaluator), a specialized 8B-parameter language model designed to evaluate AI tutors. Aligned with the four core evaluation tracks from the BEA 2025 Shared Task, our model assesses pedagogical ability across Mistake Identification, Mistake Location, Guidance, and Actionability. Because pedagogical evaluation is a specialized task with limited labeled data, we leverage knowledge distillation from a frontier LLM to generate additional supervision, yielding absolute performance gains up to 22.63 percentage points. Finally, we demonstrate FATE's utility as an automated evaluator by benchmarking instructional responses generated by popular commercial models, including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek. On average, we have found that Gemini 2.5 Flash perfomed best (82.88%), then ChatGPT 5.5 Instant (80.75%), followed by DeepSeek V4 Flash (80.13%) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (74.00%).
title: Knowledge Distillation for Automated AI Tutor Evaluation
title_translated: 用于自动AI导师评估的知识蒸馏
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLM）在K-12及高等教育中的快速融合，已远超可靠评估其教学质量方法的发展速度。随着研究社区开始探索自动化评估AI导师的可行性，我们提出了FATE（FLC AI导师评估器），一个专为评估AI导师而设计的80亿参数语言模型。该模型与BEA 2025共享任务中的四个核心评估维度对齐，涵盖错误识别、错误定位、指导性与可操作性。由于教学评估是一项专业性强且标注数据有限的任务，我们利用前沿大模型进行知识蒸馏以生成额外监督信号，从而实现最高达22.63个百分点的性能提升。最后，我们通过基准测试主流商业模型（包括ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini和DeepSeek）生成的教学响应，展示了FATE作为自动化评估工具的有效性。平均来看，Gemini 2.5 Flash 表现最佳（82.88%），其次是ChatGPT 5.5 Instant（80.75%），然后是DeepSeek V4 Flash（80.13%）和Claude Sonnet 4.6（74.00%）。

summary: An LLM agent's public behaviour reveals little about its social reasoning: an agent that votes correctly may be guessing, and an agent that lies well leaves no trace of what it actually believes. We present MafiaScope, an open testbed that turns the social deduction game Mafia into a measurement instrument for machine Theory of Mind. After every public utterance, every agent privately answers a configurable set of structured probe questions; the answers never re-enter the game and are scored automatically against the ground truth the engine knows. An interactive visualizer renders the belief trajectories: impersonate mode shows the game as one agent sees it, panels chart timeline-aligned accuracy and calibration, and counterfactual replay forks any recorded step. In a 32-game DeepSeek case study with 13{,}815 parsed probe answers, stated confidence is poorly calibrated, with expected calibration error 0.17, agents over-predict being suspected 1.5 times, and a 30-fork replay experiment walks the counterfactual replay workflow end to end. Engine, viewer and a corpus of 200+ cross-model games are released under an open licence; live demo: https://karpovilia.github.io/mafiascope/; screencast: https://vimeo.com/1208920221.
title: MafiaScope: Non-Invasive, Time-Resolved Belief Probing for LLM Agents in Social Deduction Games
title_translated: MafiaScope：面向社会推理游戏中的LLM智能体的非侵入式、时序化信念探测
summary_translated: LLM智能体的公开行为无法揭示其社会推理过程：一个正确投票的智能体可能是猜测，而一个善于说谎的智能体也不会留下其真实信念的痕迹。我们提出MafiaScope，一个开放测试平台，将社交推理游戏Mafia转化为衡量机器心智理论的测量工具。在每次公开发言后，每个智能体都会私下回答一组可配置的结构化探测问题；答案不会重新进入游戏，而是由引擎自动与真实情况对比评分。交互式可视化器呈现信念轨迹：模拟模式展示智能体所见的游戏状态，面板图表显示时间对齐的准确率与校准度，反事实重播可回放任意记录步骤。在一项包含32场游戏、13,815条解析探测答案的DeepSeek案例研究中，发现陈述信心严重失准，预期校准误差为0.17，智能体高估被怀疑的概率达1.5倍，30次反事实重播实验完整演示了反事实重播流程。引擎、可视化工具及200+跨模型游戏语料库已开源发布；在线演示：https://karpovilia.github.io/mafiascope/；视频演示：https://vimeo.com/1208920221。

summary: We present Anamnesis, an interactive system for demographically controllable survey simulation using large language models. Open-source, and designed for non-technical users/researchers, Anamnesis enables the prototyping and stress-testing of survey instruments on virtual populations rather than real human subjects. The platform operationalizes the recently introduced Anthology and Alterity frameworks, which use structured narrative backstories to condition model responses, within a unified web interface. It supports open-ended generation, probabilistic demographic resampling, and multimodal (image and audio) surveys. We evaluate the system through two case studies: (1) replicating segments of Pew Research Center's American Trends Panel (ATP) on political typology and biomedical issues and (2) emulating human preference in the New Yorker Caption Contest. In both cases, Anamnesis produces opinion distributions that more closely match real-world survey data than standard persona-prompting baselines, offering a transparent, reproducible, and open-source alternative to proprietary simulation services.
title: Anamnesis: An Open-Source Platform for Large-Scale Backstory-Conditioned Survey Simulation
title_translated: Anamnesis：一个大规模背景故事条件化问卷模拟的开源平台
summary_translated: 我们提出Anamnesis，一个基于大语言模型的可交互式人口统计学可控问卷模拟系统。该系统开源，专为非技术用户和研究人员设计，使研究者能够在虚拟人群上原型化和压力测试问卷工具，而非真实人类受试者。平台整合了近期提出的Anthology和Alterity框架，利用结构化叙事背景故事来调节模型响应，并在统一的网页界面中实现。系统支持开放式生成、概率性人口统计重采样以及多模态（图像与音频）问卷。通过两个案例研究评估系统：(1) 在政治类型和生物医学议题上复现皮尤研究中心美国趋势面板（ATP）的部分内容；(2) 模拟《纽约客》标题竞赛中的人类偏好。在两种情况下，Anamnesis生成的意见分布比标准人物提示基线更接近真实世界调查数据，提供了一种透明、可复现且开源的替代方案，优于专有仿真服务。

summary: LLM-as-a-judge evaluation is widely used for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), but reusing the same model family as both generator and judge makes self-leniency difficult to identify. We introduce Eval-Pair Matrix, a controlled meta evaluation protocol for source-grounded RAG. Starting from GaRAGe questions and grounding passages, we induce one hidden answer-causal contradiction per record, generate answers from perturbed passages with GPT, Grok, and Gemini models, and then use the same models as blind judges to evaluate each answer against the original passages. The experiment contains 300 core records, 897 labeled generator outputs, and 2,683 judge verdicts in a crossed 3 x 3 matrix; the primary analysis uses 275 fully validated records. Instead of comparing diagonal and off-diagonal cells across different answers, we estimate same-model effects by pairing judges on the exact same candidate answer. This changes the interpretation: diagonal and off diagonal F1 are similar, and the paired same-model recall effect is near zero (-0.5 pp; 95% cluster bootstrap CI [-2.7, +1.7]). The only robust paired gap is lower matching-judge flagging for answers that avoided the induced claim (-4.3 pp). A targeted human evaluation finds that reviewed apparent false positives are alternate source-error detections, mistakes in labeling whether the induced claim was adopted, or unclear cases; none were adjudicated as genuine false alarms. The lesson is methodological: RAG judge studies should report full matrices, answer-paired effects, behavior strata, and label-task alignment.
title: Eval-Pair Matrix: Answer-Paired Meta-Evaluation of LLM Judges for Grounded RAG
title_translated: Eval-Pair Matrix：基于源文本的RAG任务中LLM裁判的答案配对元评估
summary_translated: 使用大语言模型作为裁判的评估方法广泛应用于检索增强生成（RAG）任务中，但若同一模型家族同时担任生成器和裁判，则难以识别自我宽容问题。我们引入Eval-Pair Matrix，一种针对源文本基础RAG的受控元评估协议。从GaRAGe问题和支撑段落出发，每条记录诱导一个隐藏的答案因果矛盾，通过GPT、Grok和Gemini模型对扰动后的段落生成答案，随后使用相同模型作为盲评裁判，将每个答案与原始段落进行对比评估。实验包含300个核心记录、897个标注的生成输出和2,683个裁判判断，构成3×3交叉矩阵；主分析基于275个完全验证的记录。不同于以往比较不同答案的对角与非对角单元，我们通过将同一候选答案的裁判配对来估计同模型效应。这一方法改变了解读方式：对角与非对角F1值相似，而配对同模型召回率效应接近于零（-0.5个百分点；95%聚类自举置信区间[-2.7, +1.7]）。唯一显著的配对差距是避免诱导主张的答案在匹配裁判标记上的降低（-4.3个百分点）。针对性的人工评估发现，看似误报的情况实为替代来源错误检测、对诱导主张是否采纳的标签错误或模糊案例；无一被判定为真正的误报。研究启示在于方法论层面：RAG裁判研究应报告完整矩阵、答案配对效应、行为分层及标签-任务一致性。

summary: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing is usually taken to require arity actions: reductions such as \(\textsc{Reduce-}X\#k\) specify both the mother label and the number of children to be composed. We show that this arity parameter is not a necessary transition primitive. Our parser introduces constituent labels separately and recovers reduction spans from delimiter-bounded stack configurations. In a well-formed reduction configuration, arity is uniquely determined by the active delimiter and the label marker, making it a derived property of parser state rather than an action label. This factorization removes label--arity-specific reduce actions while preserving direct construction of original non-binary trees. Experiments on PTB and CTB show that the delimiter-guided parser remains competitive with an arity-specific bottom-up baseline under the same implementation framework, with substantially smaller action inventories. Analyses further show that its predicted arity profile remains close to the gold treebanks and that high-arity constituents do not collapse when arity actions are removed.
title: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions
title_translated: 无需序数动作的非二叉自底向上句法成分分析
summary_translated: 通常认为非二叉自底向上句法成分分析需要序数动作：如Reduce-X#k这类规约操作需同时指定父节点标签和待组合子节点数量。我们证明该序数参数并非必需的转移原语。我们的解析器分别引入成分标签，并从由分隔符限定的栈配置中恢复规约跨度。在合法的规约配置中，序数由活跃分隔符和标签标记唯一确定，因此是解析器状态的衍生属性，而非动作标签。这种分解消除了标签-序数特定的规约动作，同时保持了对原始非二叉树的直接构建能力。在PTB和CTB数据集上的实验表明，在相同实现框架下，该分隔符引导的解析器仍能与序数特定的自底向上基线竞争，且动作集合显著更小。进一步分析显示，其预测的序数分布与真实语料库接近，且移除序数动作后高序数成分不会发生坍塌。

summary: We investigate how annotator demographic attributes, supplied as prompt cues, shape the alignment between large language model (LLM) predictions and human annotations across five tasks. Using five open-source LLMs, we systematically vary the number and composition of demographic components in the prompt, spanning every combination from single-attribute through full-attribute configurations. Our experiments reveal three principal findings. First, alignment consistently peaks with one to three high-signal attributes and degrades under the full attribute set, establishing a clear over-specification threshold. Second, the overall magnitude of demographic influence on human annotations does not predict which attributes improve LLM alignment; instead, both the learnability and the directional coherence of each attribute's annotation signal need to be considered jointly. Third, neuron probing reveals that specialized activation correlates with alignment gains only under coherent annotation signals, and that activation volume alone does not imply steerability. Together, these results demonstrate that demographic prompting is not a monolithic intervention: its utility is highly context-dependent, shaped by attribute signal quality, task characteristics, and model architecture.
title: Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement
title_translated: 大规模人口统计学提示：更多属性反而损害LLM与人类的一致性
summary_translated: 我们研究了标注者的人口统计学属性作为提示线索时，如何影响大语言模型（LLM）预测与人类标注之间的一致性，涵盖五个任务。使用五个开源LLM，我们系统地改变提示中人口统计学成分的数量与组合，覆盖从单属性到全属性配置的所有组合。实验揭示三个主要发现：第一，一致性在包含一至三个高信号属性时达到峰值，而在全属性集合下则下降，确立了明显的过度指定阈值；第二，人口统计学影响的整体强度无法预测哪些属性能提升LLM一致性；相反，必须联合考虑每个属性标注信号的学习性和方向一致性；第三，神经元探测显示，只有在标注信号具有一致性时，特定激活才与一致性提升相关，仅激活量本身并不意味着可调控性。综合来看，这些结果表明人口统计学提示并非单一干预手段：其有效性高度依赖上下文，受属性信号质量、任务特征和模型架构共同影响。

summary: Multimodal BrowseComp tasks require agents to combine perception, tool use, and long-horizon reasoning over dynamic web content, challenging their ability to handle compositional structure, open-world uncertainty, and multimodal integration across extended interactions. Crucially, real-world multimodal browsing involves three distinct information-flow patterns: text-only, image-to-text, and text-to-image, yet existing data construction methods cover only the text-only and image-to-text patterns, leaving text-to-image largely unaddressed and limiting agent generality and robustness. We introduce UNIBROWSE, a unified data pipeline that for the first time simultaneously generates training data covering all three patterns, augments curated knowledge graphs with live web retrieval for improved fidelity, and introduces a novel metric of exploration degree to filter low-signal instances for efficient reinforcement learning. Through this pipeline, we produce high-quality cold-start tool-use trajectories and exploration-rich QA pairs, and train a 35B-scale agent via supervised fine-tuning and exploration-aware RL.The resulting UNIBROWSE agent achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal BrowseComp benchmarks, attaining an average accuracy of 54.4 across five diverse benchmarks -- an improvement of 10.5 points over its base model Qwen3.5-35B-A3B -- and surpassing serveral closed-source agent workflows such as GPT-5 (42.9), Gemini-2.5 Pro (44.8), and Gemini-2.5 Flash (41.3).
title: UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp
title_translated: UNIBROWSE：面向多模态浏览比较任务的数据到智能体框架
summary_translated: 多模态浏览比较（BrowseComp）任务要求智能体结合感知、工具使用和对动态网页内容的长周期推理，挑战其处理组合结构、开放世界不确定性以及跨长时间交互的多模态融合能力。关键的是，现实世界的多模态浏览涉及三种不同的信息流模式：纯文本、图像转文本、文本转图像，但现有数据构建方法仅覆盖前两种模式，导致文本转图像模式基本未被关注，限制了智能体的泛化能力和鲁棒性。我们提出UNIBROWSE，首个统一的数据流水线，首次同时生成涵盖所有三种模式的训练数据，通过实时网络检索增强精选知识图谱以提高保真度，并引入一种新颖的探索程度度量来过滤低信号实例，以实现高效的强化学习。通过该流水线，我们生成高质量的冷启动工具使用轨迹和探索丰富的问答对，并基于监督微调和探索感知强化学习训练了一个350亿参数规模的智能体。所得到的UNIBROWSE智能体在五个多样化的多模态BrowseComp基准上达到领先性能，平均准确率达54.4，较其基础模型Qwen3.5-35B-A3B提升10.5个百分点，并超越多个闭源智能体工作流，如GPT-5（42.9）、Gemini-2.5 Pro（44.8）和Gemini-2.5 Flash（41.3）。

summary: When an LLM judge calls a peer review analytical and a human committee calls another review high quality, are they tracking the same thing? We argue they are not, and that the difference matters philosophically. We operationalise Kahneman's dual-process theory into a structured rubric for peer review and release Kahneman4Review, a benchmark of 3,563 rated reviews scored along nine theoretically motivated textual dimensions, eight bias diagnostics, and a continuous reasoning-quality score. Three findings bear on trustworthiness: decision tier is not detectably aligned with the rubric's text-grounded epistemic-quality proxy; public-showcase agentic reviews receive higher raw scores than pooled human reviews, but length and venue explain most of the gap and the samples are not paper-paired; and ICLR review-text diagnostics shift at the 2022--2023 transition, temporally coincident with widespread LLM availability but without identifying its cause. A matched function-probe pilot further shows that the rubric distinguishes textual probes designed to contrast genuine fault-finding with surface fluency. We argue that a trustworthy reliability benchmark for LLM judges must separate analytical form from epistemic function, and propose concrete design choices toward that goal. An interactive demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/nuojohnchen/Kahneman4Review.
title: Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews
title_translated: 直觉表达还是真实分析？基于LLM作为评审者的同行评审认知可靠性基准测试
summary_translated: 当一个大语言模型（LLM）评委认为某篇同行评审具有分析性，而人类评审委员会却认为另一篇评审质量很高时，他们是否在衡量相同的事物？我们认为并非如此，且这种差异在哲学上具有重要意义。我们将卡尼曼的双过程理论转化为一种结构化的同行评审评分框架，并发布Kahneman4Review基准，包含3,563篇经过评分的评审文章，涵盖九个理论驱动的文本维度、八个偏见诊断指标以及一个连续的推理质量评分。三个发现涉及可信度：决策层级与评分框架中基于文本的认知质量代理指标之间无明显对齐；公开展示的代理式评审得分高于人工汇总评审，但这一差距主要由篇幅和发表场合解释，且样本未进行论文配对；ICLR评审文本的诊断特征在2022–2023年过渡期发生转变，时间上与大语言模型广泛可用同步，但未能确定其成因。一项匹配的功能探测初步实验进一步表明，该评分框架能够区分旨在对比真实问题发现与表面流畅性的文本探测。我们主张，可信的LLM评委可靠性基准必须将分析形式与认知功能区分开来，并提出了具体的设计方向。交互式演示可在 https://huggingface.co/spaces/nuojohnchen/Kahneman4Review 获取。

summary: Patent claim drafting is a challenging legal drafting task that requires technical expertise, precise linguistic control, strict adherence to formal conventions, and the preservation of complex logical relationships among claim elements. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been widely used to improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), recent evidence suggests that its benefits may be limited, or even negative, in highly structured or pattern-sensitive tasks. Therefore, this paper investigates whether CoT prompting benefits patent claim generation. We propose a task-specific CoT method for patent claim generation and evaluate its effectiveness through both automatic metrics and human expert assessment. Our results show that reasoning-enhanced prompting can improve claim quality. Moreover, we demonstrate a counter-intuitive but important empirical finding: implicit CoT, where reasoning is kept internal rather than explicitly verbalized, consistently outperforms explicit CoT. Through systematic analysis, we show that explicit CoT can introduce an unnecessary information bottleneck for claim generation. Verbalized reasoning may compromise the quality of final outputs through three specific mechanisms: abstraction of critical details, disruption of internalized generation patterns, and cascading error propagation. Our findings provide new insights into legal tasks and CoT applications.
title: When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation
comment: Accepted to AI for Law Workshop @ ICML 2026
title_translated: 推理反而损害法律起草？专利权利要求生成中的表述瓶颈
summary_translated: 专利权利要求起草是一项极具挑战性的法律任务，需要技术专长、精确的语言控制、严格遵守正式规范，以及保持权利要求元素间复杂逻辑关系。尽管思维链（CoT）提示已被广泛用于提升大语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力，但近期证据表明，其在高度结构化或模式敏感的任务中可能效果有限，甚至产生负面影响。因此，本文研究CoT提示是否有助于专利权利要求生成。我们提出一种面向专利权利要求生成的任务特定CoT方法，并通过自动指标和人工专家评估来检验其有效性。结果表明，增强推理的提示可以提升权利要求质量。此外，我们揭示了一个反直觉但重要的实证发现：隐式CoT（即推理过程保留在内部而不显式表述）始终优于显式CoT。通过系统分析，我们发现显式CoT可能为权利要求生成引入不必要的信息瓶颈。显式表述推理可能通过三种机制损害最终输出质量：关键细节的抽象化、内部生成模式的破坏，以及错误的级联传播。这些发现为法律任务及CoT应用提供了新见解。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for retrieving knowledge through seamless, human-like interactions. Despite their advanced text generation capabilities, LLMs exhibit hallucination tendencies, where they generate factually incorrect statements and fabricate knowledge, undermining their reliability and trustworthiness. Multiple studies have explored methods to evaluate LLM uncertainty and detect hallucinations. However, existing approaches are often probabilistic and computationally expensive, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we introduce diversion decoding, a novel method for developing an LLM uncertainty heuristic by actively challenging model-generated responses during the decoding phase. Through diversion decoding, we extract features that capture the LLM's resistance to produce alternative answers and utilize these features to train a machine-learning model to develop a heuristic measure of the LLM's uncertainty. Our experimental results demonstrate that diversion decoding outperforms existing methods with significantly lower computational complexity, making it an efficient and robust solution for evaluating hallucination detection.
title: Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding
title_translated: 利用偏离解码检测大语言模型中的幻觉
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）已成为通过自然、类人交互实现知识检索的强大工具。尽管其文本生成能力先进，但LLMs仍存在幻觉倾向，即生成事实错误的陈述并虚构知识，从而削弱其可靠性和可信度。已有多个研究探索了评估LLM不确定性与检测幻觉的方法。然而，现有方法通常依赖概率计算且计算成本高，限制了实际应用。本文提出一种名为“偏离解码”的新方法，通过在解码阶段主动挑战模型生成的回答，构建LLM不确定性的启发式度量。通过偏离解码，我们提取出反映模型抗拒生成替代答案的特征，并利用这些特征训练机器学习模型，以建立LLM不确定性的启发式评估体系。实验结果表明，偏离解码在性能上优于现有方法，且计算复杂度显著降低，是一种高效且稳健的幻觉检测解决方案。

summary: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) as multi-turn conversational partners requires probing capabilities that single-turn benchmarks miss: persona consistency, evolving intent tracking, emotional dynamics, and goal completion. We introduce EYT-Bench, a human-centered benchmark built around a three-party decoupled design: a persona-grounded user simulator, a target model that separates intent perception from response generation, and an independent third-party LLM judge with optional multi-judge ensembling. Personas are sampled from public human-curated corpora, Nemotron-Personas-USA and PersonaMem-v2, rather than synthesized, reducing LLM-induced persona bias. EYT-Bench also introduces two trajectory-level metrics: embedding-based intent drift and final-intent completion rate (FICR), inspired by tau-bench. In a 17-target x 200-dialogue evaluation, EYT-Bench reveals four findings: (i) state-of-the-art closed- and open-source models are statistically close on subjective dimensions (empathy / persona / anthropomorphism vary within <= 0.3), but differ by up to 9x on objective intent tracking; (ii) reasoning ("thinking on") sharply improves objective tracking on long-context personas (+0.47-0.50 latent-intent accuracy on Gemma-4) while leaving subjective scores nearly unchanged; (iii) persona format dominates trajectory spread, with FICR saturating above 0.95 on Nemotron-USA but spreading from 0.53 to 0.88 on PersonaMem-v2; and (iv) the warm-up effect is robust on 16/17 models (one outlier, GPT-5.5, reverses the effect), with stable rankings across alpha in [0.05, 0.15]. A cross-judge ablation using deepseek-v4-pro confirms that target rankings and final-intent satisfaction are preserved across judges.
title: Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging
title_translated: 享受你的对话：一种去耦用户模拟、目标建模与评判的人本多轮对话基准
summary_translated: 评估大语言模型（LLMs）作为多轮对话伙伴的能力，需要超越单轮基准所忽视的探查能力：角色一致性、意图演化追踪、情感动态变化以及目标完成度。我们提出EYT-Bench，一种以人为本的基准，采用三方去耦设计：基于角色的用户模拟器、分离意图感知与响应生成的目标模型，以及独立的第三方LLM评判者（支持多评判者集成）。角色来源于公开的人工标注语料库Nemotron-Personas-USA和PersonaMem-v2，而非合成生成，从而减少LLM引发的角色偏差。EYT-Bench还引入两个轨迹级指标：基于嵌入的意图漂移和最终意图完成率（FICR），受tau-bench启发。在17个目标模型 × 200次对话的评估中，EYT-Bench揭示四项发现：(i) 当前最先进的闭源与开源模型在主观维度（共情/角色/拟人化）上统计接近（差异≤0.3），但在客观意图追踪上相差高达9倍；(ii) 推理（“思考”）显著提升了长上下文角色情境下的客观追踪表现（Gemma-4的潜在意图准确率提升0.47–0.50），而主观评分几乎不变；(iii) 角色格式主导轨迹扩散，FICR在Nemotron-USA上饱和于0.95以上，而在PersonaMem-v2上则从0.53到0.88不等；(iv) 热身效应在16/17个模型中稳健存在（仅GPT-5.5出现反转），且在α∈[0.05, 0.15]范围内排名稳定。使用deepseek-v4-pro的跨评判消融实验确认，目标模型排名与最终意图满意度在不同评判者间保持一致。

summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promising potential in news summarization tasks, their performance on long-document summarization remains challenging as their length often exceeds the input limits. As the agent investment, which provide possibility to improve the inherent capabilities of LLMs. To enhance the effectiveness of long-document summarization based on LLMs, this paper proposes an expert-editor stepwise questioning multi-agent method, in which the expert and the editor guide another agent to refine the summary by posing questions on different aspects of the content and providing targeted clues for revision. We conducted experiments on two representative long-document scientific datasets and evaluated the results through widely recognized automatic metrics. The results demonstrated the effectiveness of our method.
title: A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization
title_translated: 分步提问专家编辑多智能体框架用于长文档摘要
summary_translated: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在新闻摘要任务中展现出巨大潜力，但其在长文档摘要上的表现仍面临挑战，因为文档长度常超出输入限制。随着智能体投资的发展，为提升LLMs的内在能力提供了可能性。为增强基于LLMs的长文档摘要的有效性，本文提出一种专家-编辑分步提问多智能体方法，其中专家与编辑引导另一个智能体通过针对内容不同方面提出问题，并提供针对性修订线索，逐步优化摘要。我们在两个代表性的长文档科学数据集上进行了实验，并通过广泛认可的自动指标评估结果。结果证明了该方法的有效性。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) excel at generating long chains of thought, but long reasoning traces are often verbose and memory-inefficient. In this work, we introduce Structured Thoughts, a framework that organizes reasoning into alternating <try> and <outcome> blocks: <try> captures exploratory scratch work, while <outcome> contains the distilled conclusion of that step. We construct a dataset of structured thoughts by segmenting reasoning traces into <try> blocks and prompting an LLM to summarize each step into its corresponding <outcome>. Fine-tuning pretrained foundation models on this reformatted data produces models that adopt the structured reasoning style, leading to performance gains of up to 8.08\% on reasoning benchmarks compared to standard SFT. The explicit structure also enables context pruning: after each <try>/<outcome> pair, the <try> can be pruned, allowing the model to retain conclusions without keeping the full scratch work in the context. A proof-of-concept pruning implementation achieves an average of 85\% memory / context savings with an 8.67\% performance drop across mathematical tasks.
title: Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning
title_translated: 结构化思维：提升推理与上下文剪枝能力
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成长串思维链方面表现出色，但过长的推理过程往往冗长且内存效率低下。本文提出结构化思维（Structured Thoughts）框架，将推理组织为交替的<尝试>和<结果>块： <尝试>用于捕捉探索性草稿，而<结果>则包含该步骤的提炼结论。我们通过将推理轨迹分割为<尝试>块，并提示LLM将每一步总结为对应的<结果>，构建了一个结构化思维数据集。在该重构数据上微调预训练基础模型，可使模型采用结构化推理风格，在推理基准测试中性能提升高达8.08%，优于标准SFT方法。显式的结构还支持上下文剪枝：在每个<尝试>/<结果>对之后，可删除<尝试>部分，使模型仅保留结论而无需保存完整的草稿内容。一个概念验证的剪枝实现，在数学任务中平均节省85%的内存/上下文空间，性能下降仅8.67%。

summary: We introduce CAFE (Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation), an open-source platform that brings design of experiments to the evaluation of compound AI systems (CAIS). Such systems expose many interchangeable choices - e.g. which retriever, model, or prompt - and practitioners rarely know which of them most affects answer quality. With CAFE, a practitioner registers each swappable component of a pipeline as a factor to build a factorial design over the chosen factors, run the resulting configurations, and score the answers on a shared rubric using a configurable LLM judge together with human raters. From these ratings it attributes answer-quality variance to the components and their interactions with mixed-effects models and reports effect sizes, significance, the best configuration, cost and latency trade-offs, and judge-human reliability. Whereas existing tools mostly either search for a good configuration or score outputs in isolation, CAFE also explains which component drives quality and whether an observed difference is significant. We validate CAFE on a retrieval-augmented question-answering (QA) pipeline over the HotpotQA benchmark dataset, where it recovers planted factor effects and stays calibrated under a permutation null. CAFE is released as a Python package and as a Web application.
title: CAFE: A Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation Framework
title_translated: CAFE：复合人工智能因子评估框架
summary_translated: 我们提出了CAFE（复合人工智能因子评估），一个开源平台，将实验设计引入复合人工智能系统（CAIS）的评估中。此类系统包含大量可互换的选择——例如使用哪个检索器、模型或提示词——而从业者通常难以确定哪些因素最影响答案质量。借助CAFE，实践者可将流水线中的每个可替换组件注册为一个因子，构建因子设计，运行生成的配置，并使用可配置的LLM评分器结合人工评分者，基于统一评分标准对答案进行评分。从这些评分中，利用混合效应模型分析各组件及其交互对答案质量方差的影响，报告效应大小、显著性、最优配置、成本与延迟权衡以及评分者与人类的一致性。与现有工具大多仅搜索良好配置或孤立评分输出不同，CAFE还能解释是哪个组件驱动了质量变化，以及观察到的差异是否具有统计显著性。我们在HotpotQA基准数据集上的检索增强问答（QA）流水线中验证了CAFE的有效性，其成功恢复了预设的因子效应，并在置换零假设下保持校准。CAFE已作为Python包和Web应用发布。

summary: Algorithmic decision systems in financial services often rely on data proxies that inadvertently encode structural inequalities. This paper introduces a hierarchical human-AI triage model for Point of Sale fraud detection in the Nigerian FinTech sector. Adopting a We Are All Equal worldview, we address the challenge of discrimination laundering, wherein the system misinterprets infrastructure related aleatoric noise such as rural network timeouts as fraudulent intent. We implement a three-tier routing policy utilizing a calibrated ensemble model as a primary filter. The policy routes transactions characterized by epistemic uncertainty such as cold start new accounts to specialist analysts while reserving high stakes cases for a senior supervisor. To manage finite human capacity, we utilize a dynamic shadow price to ration human attention and implement a random audit mechanism to prevent human skill atrophy. Our experimental results demonstrate a statistically significant 1.88\% complementarity gap and a 24.79\% percentage point gain in fraud recall over an autonomous baseline. Crucially, the model reduces the regional performance gap from 19.43 to 2.88 percentage points, neutralizing structural bias. Hierarchical collaboration provides a robust mechanism for substantive equality of opportunity, ensuring that rural accounts are not excluded from the digital economy due to environmental brute luck.
title: Neutralizing Structural Inequality in the Nigerian FinTech Sector
title_translated: 消除尼日利亚金融科技领域中的结构性不平等
summary_translated: 金融服务业中的算法决策系统常依赖于无意中编码结构性不平等的数据代理。本文针对尼日利亚金融科技领域的销售点欺诈检测，提出一种分层人机协同筛选模型。秉持‘我们皆平等’的世界观，我们解决了‘歧视洗白’问题，即系统将基础设施相关的随机噪声（如农村网络超时）误判为欺诈意图。我们实施三层路由策略，利用校准后的集成模型作为主过滤器：将具有认知不确定性（如新账户冷启动）的交易路由至专业分析师，而高风险案件则交由高级主管处理。为管理有限的人力资源，我们采用动态影子价格机制分配人力注意力，并实施随机审计机制以防止人工技能退化。实验结果表明，模型在统计上显著缩小了1.88%的互补性差距，并在欺诈召回率上比自主基线提升了24.79个百分点。关键的是，模型将区域性能差距从19.43个百分点降至2.88个百分点，有效消除了结构性偏见。分层协作提供了一种实现实质性机会平等的稳健机制，确保农村账户不会因环境偶然因素被排除在数字经济之外。

summary: The rapid proliferation of online polarization threatens social cohesion, necessitating robust automated detection systems that operate effectively across diverse linguistic contexts. This paper presents our system description for the POLAR Shared Task 2026, focusing on the detection and characterization of polarized discourse in English and Hausa. We propose a hybrid modeling strategy: for English binary detection, we leverage the monolingual strength of \textbf{DeBERTa}, while for Hausa and all fine-grained subtasks (Types and Manifestations), we utilize \textbf{AfroXLMR-Social}. This domain-adapted multilingual model proved critical for capturing the nuances of polarization in social media text. To further address computational constraints and data scarcity, we implement Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and textual data augmentation via \texttt{nlpaug}. We report competitive results across all three subtasks, demonstrating that model selection tailored to specific subtask requirements yields the best balance of performance.
title: Polarization Detection: A Hybrid Approach with AfroXLMR-Social and DeBERTa for Low- and High-Resource Settings
title_translated: 极化检测：面向低资源与高资源场景的混合方法（AfroXLMR-Social与DeBERTa）
summary_translated: 在线极化的迅速蔓延威胁社会凝聚力，亟需能够在多样化语言环境中高效运行的自动化检测系统。本文介绍了我们在POLAR共享任务2026中的系统方案，聚焦于英语和豪萨语中极化话语的检测与表征。我们提出一种混合建模策略：对于英语二分类检测任务，利用单语模型DeBERTa的优势；而对于豪萨语及所有细粒度子任务（类型与表现形式），则采用专为社交文本优化的多语言模型AfroXLMR-Social。该领域自适应多语言模型在捕捉社交媒体文本中极化的细微差别方面至关重要。为进一步应对计算约束和数据稀缺问题，我们采用了低秩适配（LoRA）和通过nlpaug进行文本数据增强。我们在所有三个子任务中均取得了具有竞争力的结果，证明根据具体子任务需求定制模型选择能获得最佳性能平衡。

summary: Preparing for job interviews is important for securing desired positions, yet realistic practice remains difficult to access: real interviews are infrequent, expert mock coaching is costly, and self-practice offers neither adaptive dialogue nor structured assessment. Existing systems typically address only parts of this need through fixed question sequences, limited communication channels, or feedback with little supporting evidence. We present PolyInterview, an LLM-based platform for immersive mock interview practice with comprehensive multimodal assessment. PolyInterview uses the target job description and CV to generate questions tailored to the role and candidate, conducts multi-turn spoken interviews with a lip-synced digital human interviewer that asks answer-aware follow-up questions, and evaluates response content, vocal delivery, and non-verbal behavior. Four parallel evaluators produce 13 behavior-level features that are aggregated into 10 assessment aspects and two competency tracks. Guided by the KSA and STAR frameworks, the report links each score to behavioral evidence and actionable recommendations. PolyInterview is publicly accessible. Its current all-account snapshot contains 101 accounts, 1,564 interview sessions, 7,665 generated questions, and 1,422 five-stage question sets. Generated questions are more closely aligned with their matched job description than with cross-role job descriptions in 93.7% of sessions. An evaluation by ten experts found strong question plans and actionable feedback.
title: PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment
title_translated: PolyInterview：基于大模型的沉浸式模拟面试平台与全面多模态评估
summary_translated: 准备求职面试对获得理想职位至关重要，但真实练习却难以获取：真实面试频次低，专家模拟辅导成本高，而自我练习既缺乏自适应对话，也无结构化评估。现有系统通常仅部分满足需求，通过固定问题序列、有限沟通渠道或缺乏支持证据的反馈来应对。我们提出PolyInterview，一个基于大模型的沉浸式模拟面试平台，具备全面的多模态评估能力。PolyInterview利用目标职位描述和简历生成量身定制的问题，通过唇同步的数字人面试官进行多轮语音面试，并提出基于回答内容的追问问题，同时评估回答内容、语音表达和非语言行为。四个并行评估器生成13个行为级特征，聚合为10个评估维度和两个能力轨道。基于KSA和STAR框架，报告将每个评分与行为证据关联，并提供可操作建议。PolyInterview已公开可用。当前全账户快照包含101个账户、1,564次面试会话、7,665个生成问题和1,422个五阶段问题集。生成问题在93.7%的会话中与匹配职位描述的相关性高于跨角色描述。十位专家评估认为其问题规划质量高，反馈具有可操作性。

summary: Information locality, the tendency for syntactically related words to appear close together, shapes both human language processing and language model learning. While prior work has examined whether language models can acquire impossible languages, it remains unclear whether they can recover natural language from such input and what this reveals about their inductive biases. We address this by complementing learnability-based approaches with a reconstruction framework: fine-tuning GPT-2 models pre-trained on impossible languages to reconstruct natural English from three perturbation types. Our findings show that the recovered structures exhibit shorter dependency lengths than the original text, mirroring the locality preference observed in unconstrained language model generation and providing a quantitative signature of an architectural bias that learnability experiments alone do not reveal. Recovery difficulty increases with the degree of locality disruption. Structural recovery (dependency Triple F1) dissociates from surface recovery (Exact Match), while fluency dissociates from faithful reconstruction under global shuffling. Sentence length further modulates performance: longer sentences facilitate recovery when local structure is preserved but lead to complete collapse under global shuffling. Finally, recovery difficulty tracks learnability difficulty across perturbation types, suggesting that information locality is the shared constraint governing both.
title: Language Re-generation: An investigation into information locality effects on reconstruction
title_translated: 语言重生成：信息局部性对重构影响的探究
summary_translated: 信息局部性指句法相关的词语倾向于紧密相邻，这种特性塑造了人类语言处理和语言模型的学习。尽管先前研究探讨了语言模型是否能习得不可能的语言，但尚不清楚它们能否从此类输入中恢复自然语言，以及这揭示了何种归纳偏置。我们通过补充可学习性方法，提出一种重构框架：微调在不可能语言上预训练的GPT-2模型，以从三种扰动类型中重构自然英语。研究发现，恢复出的结构具有比原始文本更短的依赖长度，与无约束语言模型生成中观察到的局部偏好一致，提供了仅靠可学习性实验无法揭示的架构偏置的量化特征。恢复难度随局部性破坏程度增加而上升。结构恢复（依赖三元组F1）与表面恢复（精确匹配）相分离，而在全局打乱下，流畅性与忠实重构也相分离。句子长度进一步调节性能：当局部结构保留时，长句有助于恢复，但在全局打乱下则导致完全崩溃。最后，恢复难度与可学习性难度在不同扰动类型间呈正相关，表明信息局部性是两者共同的约束条件。

summary: This paper investigates how language similarity can improve cross-lingual transfer for automatic speech recognition (ASR) in extremely low-resource settings. Warlpiri, an Australian Aboriginal language, has very limited transcribed speech data, making transfer learning essential. We propose a framework combining acoustic similarity from pre-trained speech models with linguistic similarity based on typology, phoneme inventories, grammatical, and syntactic features to rank high-resource source languages and evaluate their effectiveness for ASR transfer to Warlpiri. Experiments with Whisper show that acoustically and typologically similar languages outperform monolingual and multilingual baselines. Assamese and Hindi achieve substantial reductions in word and character error rates. Correlation analysis further indicates that acoustic similarity is the strongest predictor of fine-tuning performance, while phoneme inventory and typological similarity better explain zero-shot transfer.
title: Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR
title_translated: 哪些语言最适合迁移到Warlpiri？面向低资源ASR的相似性研究
summary_translated: 本文研究语言相似性如何在极低资源环境下提升自动语音识别（ASR）的跨语言迁移效果。Warlpiri是一种澳大利亚原住民语言，其转录语音数据极为有限，因此迁移学习至关重要。我们提出一个结合预训练语音模型中的声学相似性与基于类型学、音素库、语法和句法特征的语言相似性的框架，用于对高资源源语言进行排序并评估其向Warlpiri迁移的有效性。在Whisper上的实验表明，声学和类型学上相似的语言优于单语和多语基线。阿萨姆语和印地语显著降低了词错误率和字符错误率。相关性分析进一步表明，声学相似性是微调性能最强的预测因子，而音素库和类型学相似性更能解释零样本迁移的表现。

summary: Language builds discourse contexts other than the actual: a painting, a belief, a memory, a hypothetical. Each is a mental space in which the same entity can take a different value, as when a flower is red in reality but purple in a portrait. Formal semantics keeps these contexts apart because their logics differ (modal, temporal, doxastic, depictive); Fauconnier's mental-space theory treats them as one space-building operation. We ask which of these a transformer language model implements, and find a mechanistic version of Fauconnier's unification. The model uses one router/slot format across the inventory: a reusable value slot stores attributed content, and a causally manipulable router (the space index) selects which space is read. A subspace trained with Distributed Alignment Search to control one space type, counterfactual, belief, fictional, or temporal, also controls the others, well above a random floor, on three model families; belief, which formal semantics marks as a distinct case, is not specially separated. The router is low-rank, composes additively with entity identity, and acts through a few late-layer heads. Two further results show the mechanism drives inference and composes: a subspace trained on a rule-derived conclusion flips what the model infers while dissociating from what it reports, and composing space-builders mints a fresh router over the shared slot. This paper establishes the cross-type generality. A companion paper develops belief in depth, because of its special status in philosophy, psychology, and linguistics (epistemology, theory of mind, and propositional attitude reports).
title: One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models
title_translated: 一种机制应对多种心智空间：语言模型中共享值槽上的统一路由机制
summary_translated: 语言不仅构建现实语境，还涉及绘画、信念、记忆或假设等心智空间。每个心智空间中同一实体可能具有不同取值，例如一朵花在现实中是红色的，但在画作中却是紫色的。形式语义学因逻辑差异（模态、时间、信念、描绘）将这些空间区分开来；而Fauconnier的心智空间理论则将其视为同一空间构建操作。我们探究Transformer语言模型实现了哪种机制，并发现了Fauconnier统一理论的机械版本。模型在整个体系中使用统一的路由器/槽格式：一个可复用的值槽存储属性内容，而一个可因果操控的路由器（空间索引）选择读取哪个空间。在一个子空间中通过分布式对齐搜索训练以控制某一类空间（反事实、信念、虚构或时间），也能有效控制其他类型，且表现远超随机基线，在三个模型家族中均成立；形式语义学标记为独立类型的“信念”并未被特别区分。该路由器为低秩结构，与实体身份呈加性组合，并通过少数后期层头起作用。两项额外结果表明该机制驱动推理并具备组合性：一个基于规则推导结论训练的子空间会改变模型的推理结果，但与报告内容相分离；组合多个空间构建器可在共享槽上生成新的路由器。本文确立了跨类型通用性。另一篇配套论文深入探讨信念，因其在哲学、心理学和语言学中的特殊地位（认识论、心理理论、命题态度报告）。

summary: Despite advances in Emotional Intelligence (EI), Large Language Models (LLMs) still significantly underperform humans in complex emotional reasoning. This gap originates partly from the limited incorporation of individual differences, particularly personality traits, which are fundamental to human emotional inference. To address this, we propose PTEI, a novel framework for integrating Personality Traits into Emotional Intelligence tasks using LLMs. In PTEI, MBTI and OCEAN personality traits are first extracted directly from the given emotional scenarios and then utilized as contextual knowledge within personality-aware prompts, guiding LLMs to accurately infer emotions and their underlying causes. To ensure optimal contextual grounding, we employ Contrastive Learning to construct an optimized retrieval system that surfaces emotionally and personally aligned scenarios, enhancing reasoning quality. Extensive experiments on established EI benchmarks show that PTEI enhances the Emotional Understanding (EU) capabilities of various LLMs, with the strongest improvement observed in GPT models. Combining PTEI with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning yields an additional 4 percent increase in accuracy. These findings underscore PTEI's contribution toward advancing AI systems with more sophisticated social and psychological grounding.
title: PTEI: Integrating Personality Traits to Enhance Emotional Intelligence in Large Language Models
title_translated: PTEI：将人格特质融入大语言模型以增强情感智能
summary_translated: 尽管情感智能（EI）取得进展，大语言模型（LLMs）在复杂情感推理方面仍显著落后于人类。这一差距部分源于个体差异（尤其是人格特质）的有限整合，而人格特质是人类情感推断的基础。为解决此问题，我们提出PTEI，一种利用LLM将人格特质融入情感智能任务的新框架。在PTEI中，MBTI和OCEAN人格特质首先从给定的情感场景中直接提取，并作为人格感知提示中的上下文知识，引导LLM准确推断情绪及其潜在原因。为确保最佳上下文锚定，我们采用对比学习构建优化检索系统，以呈现情感与个人特质相契合的场景，从而提升推理质量。在多个标准EI基准上的大量实验表明，PTEI增强了各类LLM的情感理解（EU）能力，其中GPT系列模型改善最为显著。将PTEI与思维链（CoT）推理结合，准确率再提升4个百分点。这些发现凸显了PTEI在推动具备更复杂社会与心理基础的AI系统方面的贡献。

summary: Previous work in group recommender systems has demonstrated a sensitivity to the distribution of preferences within a group. Specifically, the selection of the preference aggregation strategy benefits from considering such group configurations. In this paper, we study whether LLMs are able to mimic this sensitivity and to select the ideal aggregation strategy (and corresponding recommendation) according to nuanced human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction, and consensus.   We do this by fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on human survey data to serve as real-time judgmental models within the recommendation pipeline. Using a reasoning dataset distilled from DeepSeek-V3.1 and human ground truth assessments, we develop Judgmental Llama and Judgmental OLMo to simulate group assessments. Our pipeline successfully generates multiple recommendation candidates based on social choice-based aggregation strategies and dynamically selects the one that maximizes these predicted human-like evaluations. We further validate these suggestions in a user study (n=284) and find that our methodology achieved the highest scores for satisfaction and group consensus. Furthermore, we find that LLM judgments are most aligned with human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction and consensus when we also consider interaction effects between our LLM-based method and group configuration (e.g., minority or coalition). These findings give further support for dynamically adapting aggregation strategies to specific within-group preference distributions, and highlight the advantage of using LLMs for an adaptation that is aligned with subjective human judgments.
title: Consensus vs. Dissent: Dynamic LLM Modeling of Subjective Preferences in Group Recommenders
