comment: Full paper accepted at the 20th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems (RecSys 2026)
title_translated: 共识与分歧：动态建模群体推荐系统中主观偏好的大语言模型研究
summary_translated: 以往关于群体推荐系统的研究表明，偏好分布对推荐策略选择具有敏感性。具体而言，偏好聚合策略的选择需考虑群体内部配置。本文研究大语言模型（LLMs）是否能够模拟这种敏感性，并根据人类对公平、满意度和共识的细微感知，动态选择最优聚合策略及相应推荐。为此，我们通过对人类调查数据进行微调，使LLMs在推荐流程中充当实时判断模型。基于DeepSeek-V3.1提炼的推理数据集与人工真实评估，我们开发了Judgmental Llama和Judgmental OLMo，用于模拟群体评估。我们的流程成功生成基于社会选择聚合策略的多个推荐候选，并动态选择能最大化预测人类类似评价的推荐。我们在一项用户研究（n=284）中验证了建议的有效性，发现本方法在满意度和群体共识得分上均最高。此外，我们发现当同时考虑基于LLM的方法与群体配置（如少数派或联盟）之间的交互效应时，LLM判断最符合人类对公平、满意度和共识的感知。这些发现进一步支持了根据群体内偏好分布动态调整聚合策略的必要性，并突显了使用LLM实现与主观人类判断对齐的自适应优势。

summary: Search APIs are the fundamental retrieval layer for many agents and are often their most frequently used tool. Traditional search APIs provide URLs, titles, and snippets that preview website contents. Because full-page retrieval is token-intensive, agent retrieval architectures increasingly use progressive disclosure: the agent first sees snippets and then chooses whether to fetch full pages. In such systems, search API performance is often evaluated primarily by answer accuracy. We argue that a commercial search API is better understood as a decision surface: the ranked snippets, URLs, and metadata that determine whether an agent answers immediately, searches again, or spends tokens opening pages. We test this claim with one frozen GPT-5.4 agent, two tools (search_web and fetch_page), and 100 questions from SEALQA-HARD, varying only the search provider (Brave, Tavily, Firecrawl). A Kimi-K2.6 oracle labels every content element visible to the agent (URL, title, snippet, and fetched page, when fetched), producing 6,869 valid per-URL judgments. We use an audited correct-answer label, semantic match, which preserves exact matches while accepting harmless formatting and naming variants. Under this measure, the providers remain close (25, 25, 26 / 100), but their evidence economies differ sharply: Brave offers gold-answer-rich snippets, Tavily concentrates gold-supporting URLs at rank 1, and Firecrawl is associated with broader exploration under this fixed agent policy. We also introduce a surface contradiction-to-gold URL ratio, which varies from 0.92 to 2.59. Provider choice is therefore a retrieval-budget and policy decision, not merely a recall decision.
title: Equal Accuracy, Unequal Evidence: Search APIs as Decision Surfaces for Tool-Using Agents
title_translated: 同等准确率，不同证据：搜索API作为工具型智能体的决策表面
summary_translated: 搜索API是许多智能体的基础检索层，也是其最常使用的工具。传统搜索API提供URL、标题和摘要，用于预览网页内容。由于完整页面检索消耗大量token，智能体检索架构越来越多地采用渐进披露机制：智能体先查看摘要，再决定是否获取完整页面。在这些系统中，搜索API的性能通常主要通过答案准确性来评估。我们认为，商业搜索API更应被视为一种决策表面：排序后的摘要、URL和元数据决定了智能体是立即回答、再次搜索，还是花费token打开页面。我们通过一个冻结的GPT-5.4智能体、两个工具（search_web和fetch_page）以及来自SEALQA-HARD的100个问题进行测试，仅改变搜索服务提供商（Brave、Tavily、Firecrawl）。Kimi-K2.6的oracle对智能体可见的每个内容元素（URL、标题、摘要及已获取的页面）进行标注，生成6,869条有效的每URL判断。我们使用经过审计的正确答案标签——语义匹配，该方法保留精确匹配的同时接受无害的格式和命名变体。在此度量下，各提供商表现接近（分别为25、25、26 / 100），但其证据经济差异显著：Brave提供的摘要富含黄金答案，Tavily将支持黄金答案的URL集中在首位，而Firecrawl则在固定智能体策略下表现出更广泛的探索行为。我们还引入了表面矛盾与黄金URL比率，该比率在0.92至2.59之间变化。因此，提供商选择本质上是检索预算与策略决策，而非单纯的召回决策。

summary: We present IsalHG, a method for representing the structure of any finite, connected hypergraph of bounded hyperedge arity as a string over a compact instruction alphabet $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$. The encoding is executed by a small virtual machine comprising a sparse hypergraph, a circular doubly-linked list (CDLL) of node references, and $k$ traversal pointers, where $k$ bounds the hyperedge arity. Instructions either move a pointer through the CDLL or insert a hyperedge, optionally together with new nodes, into the hypergraph. Every string over $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$ decodes to a valid hypergraph; the alphabet is closed. A greedy \emph{HypergraphToString} (h2s) algorithm encodes any connected hypergraph into a string; a backtracking variant seeded at nodes of lexicographically maximal structural tuple produces a \emph{canonical string} $w^{*}$, which we conjecture to be a complete isomorphism invariant. Canonical-string equality then decides hypergraph isomorphism natively, without the standard reduction to the Levi incidence graph followed by a graph-isomorphism engine. We verify the round-trip property $s2h(h2s(H)) \cong H$ on 150 connected random uniform hypergraphs and on named combinatorial designs, and we benchmark the canonical algorithm against the three practically available exact baselines -- nauty, Traces, and bliss operating on the 2-coloured Levi graph -- across a $(n, c)$ grid with ten seeds per cell. All four methods agree on every one of 600 isomorphism verdicts, consistent with the completeness conjecture. On wall-clock time the Levi baselines dominate every tested cell by three to five orders of magnitude (geometric-mean ratio $311\times$ to $117{,}672\times$), which we report as measured. We contribute the representation framework, a conjecture of canonical completeness, and the first native-versus-Levi benchmark for hypergraph isomorphism.
title: Instruction Set and Language for Hypergraphs
title_translated: 超图的指令集与语言
summary_translated: 我们提出IsalHG，一种将任意有限连通超图（超边基数有界）表示为紧凑指令字母表$Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$上的字符串的方法。编码由一个小型虚拟机执行，该虚拟机包含一个稀疏超图、一个节点引用的循环双向链表（CDLL）以及$k$个遍历指针，其中$k$限制了超边的基数。指令要么在CDLL中移动指针，要么将超边（可选地连同新节点）插入超图。$Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$上的任意字符串均可解码为有效超图；该字母表是封闭的。一种贪心的	extit{HypergraphToString}（h2s）算法可将任意连通超图编码为字符串；通过以字典序最大的结构元组为起点的回溯变体，可生成	extit{规范字符串} $w^{*}$，我们推测其为完全同构不变量。规范字符串相等性可原生判定超图同构，无需标准的转化为Levi关联图并依赖图同构引擎。我们在150个连通随机均匀超图和知名组合设计上验证了往返性质$s2h(h2s(H)) \cong H$，并在$(n, c)$网格上对四个方法（nauty、Traces、bliss与Levi图基准）进行了基准测试，每单元十次种子实验。所有四种方法在600个同构判断中一致，符合完整性猜想。在实际运行时间上，Levi基准在所有测试单元中均领先三到五个数量级（几何平均比率为311×至117,672×），我们报告了实测结果。我们贡献了表示框架、规范完整性猜想，以及首个原生vs.Levi的超图同构基准。

summary: Reasoning Language Models (RLMs) achieve their strongest performance when they reason in English, the language for which reasoning-oriented training data is most abundant. However, reasoning trace is a clue for model interpretability and safety, and useful in practice for both the model users and for model developers. Thus, it is desirable to be able to develop a model that reasons in a language of the user's choice, while still maintaining strong reasoning performance. To this end, we study the feasibility of training a model that reasons in Japanese. We develop a Japanese-reasoning variant of Qwen-3-Swallow-8B, which is a Japanese LLM continually pretrained from Qwen-3-8B, with GRPO and evaluate it across coding, math, and science benchmarks. The study shows that reasoning-language control is feasible by training a Japanese continually pretrained model with GRPO. However, its performance is at best on par with strong English-reasoning baselines on several benchmarks. We also evaluate the trained model on Japanese cultural benchmarks and observe that the model's performance is worse than the baseline models, suggesting that the reasoning in Japanese does not immediately improve performance on culturally relevant tasks for free.
title: Cost of Reasoning in non-English Languages: A Case Study on Japanese
title_translated: 非英语语言推理的成本：以日语为例的研究
summary_translated: 推理语言模型（RLMs）在以英语推理时表现最强，因为面向推理的训练数据在英语中最为丰富。然而，推理过程是模型可解释性和安全性的关键线索，在实践中对模型用户和开发者均有价值。因此，理想情况是能够开发出能在用户指定语言中推理的模型，同时仍保持强大的推理性能。为此，我们研究了训练一个日语推理模型的可行性。我们开发了Qwen-3-Swallow-8B的日语推理变体，该模型基于Qwen-3-8B持续预训练，并采用GRPO进行微调，评估其在编程、数学和科学基准上的表现。研究表明，通过使用GRPO持续预训练日语模型，实现推理语言控制是可行的。然而，其性能最多仅能与强英文推理基线持平。我们还评估了该模型在日语文化相关基准上的表现，发现其性能低于基线模型，表明在日语中推理并不会免费提升文化相关任务的表现。

summary: Spoken language models (SLMs) unify speech perception and reasoning, but adapting them to sensitive domains is underexplored, especially when the original training data is inaccessible and the use case demands multilingual, spoken-query interaction. We adapt an open-source SLM to the Singaporean Home Team context across five speech tasks in Singapore's four official languages, combining LoRA fine-tuning, a surrogate text-QA dataset that guards against catastrophic forgetting, and a multi-task objective that adapts the CoBa reweighting scheme to speech. We also build HTD-multilingual-QA, a 504,853 sample multilingual QA dataset in text and spoken form. The resulting HT-Moonstone (5B) matches or outperforms SLMs up to 7x its size on most tasks, attains the best accent and gender recognition among all models evaluated, and loses under 2\% of its original speech QA ability.
title: Efficiently Adapting Spoken Language Models for the Singaporean Context
title_translated: 高效适配口语语言模型以适应新加坡语境
summary_translated: 口语语言模型（SLMs）统一了语音感知与推理能力，但在敏感领域中的适配研究尚不充分，尤其当原始训练数据不可访问且应用场景要求多语言、语音查询交互时。我们针对新加坡官方四种语言中的五项语音任务，将开源SLM适配至新加坡内政部语境，结合LoRA微调、防止灾难性遗忘的代理文本问答数据集，以及将CoBa重加权方案适配至语音的多任务目标。我们还构建了HTD-multilingual-QA，一个包含504,853个样本的多语言问答数据集（文本与语音形式）。最终的HT-Moonstone（5B）在多数任务上达到或超过其规模达7倍的SLMs表现，成为所有评估模型中最佳的口音与性别识别模型，且语音问答能力损失不足2%。

summary: We present FindMyText, an open-source Python package designed to efficiently assess whether a given text appears, in part or in full, within a text corpus. The tool builds on prior techniques for document fingerprinting, but extends them with a novel mechanism to explicitly capture sequences of matching fingerprints. By identifying such chains, the tool can more reliably detect near-verbatim copies of a given text rather than mere textual similarities. This makes FindMyText particularly suited for verifying the presence of copyrighted material in a corpus. Leveraging a distributed, disk-based indexing framework, the system scales to large web-crawled datasets. Using a new benchmark for evaluating text containment methods, we show that FindMyText outperforms alternative approaches across three datasets (ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, and generic web content).
title: Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora
title_translated: 大规模网络爬取语料中文本包含关系的鲁棒、可扩展检测
summary_translated: 我们提出FindMyText，一个开源Python包，旨在高效评估给定文本是否部分或全部存在于文本语料库中。该工具基于先前的文档指纹技术，但引入了一种新机制，显式捕捉匹配指纹序列。通过识别此类链，工具能更可靠地检测近似原文复制，而不仅仅是文本相似性。这使得FindMyText特别适用于验证语料库中是否存在受版权保护的内容。借助分布式、基于磁盘的索引框架，该系统可扩展至大规模网络爬取数据集。使用新的文本包含方法评估基准，我们证明FindMyText在三个数据集（ArXiv论文、维基百科和通用网络内容）上优于其他替代方法。

summary: We show that post-training quantization can silently alter how large language models reason even when task accuracy is preserved. Using a six-category failure taxonomy validated by two independent human annotators (Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906), we classify 30,000 chain-of-thought outputs from five instruction-tuned LLMs (3B--14B parameters) across three quantization precisions (FP32, FP16, NF4) and four reasoning benchmarks. We find that while accuracy is robust across precisions (maximum 3.1 pp drop), Hollow Convergence (correct answers reached through incomplete or unverifiable reasoning) shows a significant size-dependent shift under NF4, dropping sharply for the two smallest models tested but remaining invariant for models at 12B parameters and above. This effect is also benchmark-specific: GSM8K is categorically immune while LogiQA and ARC-Challenge show the largest shifts. Furthermore, under NF4, Shortcut Collapse rises from 44% to 78% of wrong-answer failures in LLaMA 3.2-3B while Confidence Snowballing collapses from 15.8% to near zero, a qualitative shift invisible to accuracy metrics. Finally, we show Hollow Convergence cannot be reliably detected from surface-level text features (best F1 = 0.53), establishing it as a deployment-relevant failure mode that standard evaluation pipelines cannot catch.
title: Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts
title_translated: 量化大语言模型推理中的静默失败：基于分类法的空洞收敛与失效模式转移分析
summary_translated: 我们发现，后训练量化可以在任务准确率保持不变的情况下悄然改变大语言模型的推理方式。通过两名独立人工标注者验证的六类失效分类法（Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906），我们对五个指令微调的大语言模型（3B–14B参数）在三种量化精度（FP32、FP16、NF4）和四个推理基准下的30,000条思维链输出进行了分类。研究发现，尽管准确率在不同精度下具有鲁棒性（最大下降3.1个百分点），但空洞收敛（通过不完整或不可验证的推理得出正确答案）在NF4下表现出显著的规模依赖性变化：测试中最小的两个模型急剧下降，而12B及以上模型则保持不变。该效应也具有基准特异性：GSM8K完全免疫，而LogiQA和ARC-Challenge显示出最大变化。此外，在NF4下，LLaMA 3.2-3B的捷径坍塌从44%上升至78%的错误答案失效比例，而置信度雪球效应则从15.8%降至接近零，这种定性转变无法被准确率指标捕捉。最后，我们证明空洞收敛无法通过表面文本特征可靠检测（最佳F1仅为0.53），确立其为部署相关失效模式，标准评估流程难以察觉。

summary: This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed for long-context or high-throughput language-model serving.   Starting from LMT-60-0.6B, preliminary profiling suggests that vocabulary projection becomes a more important decode-time cost after GGUF quantization reduces the relative cost of Transformer blocks. We replace the original 151k-token vocabulary with a 64k-token subtitle-domain tokenizer, migrate the embedding space, and adapt the model through embedding calibration followed by full supervised fine-tuning.   On a fixed 500-example subset of the OpenSubtitles2024 test set, the LocalSubs achieves a 59.2% tie-excluded win rate against Google Translate under GPT-4o pairwise judging. Performance is strongest on short cues and declines as cue length increases. Preliminary Apple M2 Metal measurements on a 64k-vocabulary model show a 1.63$\times$ speedup over a 151k-vocabulary profiling baseline. The raw benchmark configuration is incomplete, so the latency result is treated as preliminary.
title: Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation
title_translated: 面向设备端实时字幕翻译的工作负载驱动优化
summary_translated: 本报告研究在台湾场景下针对短输入、短输出、单批推理、低延迟和隐私约束条件的设备端英译繁体中文字幕翻译。这些条件限制了为长上下文或高吞吐量语言模型服务设计的优化方法的价值。从LMT-60-0.6B模型出发，初步性能分析表明，在GGUF量化降低Transformer模块相对成本后，词汇投影成为更重要的解码时开销。我们用一个64k词元的字幕领域分词器替代原有的151k词元词汇表，迁移嵌入空间，并通过嵌入校准和全监督微调进行模型适配。在OpenSubtitles2024测试集的一个固定500例子集上，LocalSubs在GPT-4o成对判断下以59.2%的无平局胜率优于Google Translate。性能在短提示上最强，随提示长度增加而下降。初步Apple M2 Metal测量显示，64k词汇量模型相比151k词汇量基线实现1.63×加速。原始基准配置不完整，因此延迟结果视为初步。

summary: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark evaluation framework for measuring the faithfulness of LLM-generated clinical trial summaries across three stakeholder audiences. The framework consists of 200 stratified trials drawn from the Aggregate Analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov database, evaluated using audience-specific prompt templates and a six-dimension faithfulness annotation schema. Baseline measurements were established for GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash across 1,800 generated summaries scored using a cross-encoder natural language inference (NLI) model. Unsupported Claims was identified as the dominant failure mode across all three models, with a mean annotation score of 1.55 out of three. A knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval system was developed and evaluated against the baseline, producing statistically significant improvements in NLI-based faithfulness scores (entailment +0.0125, faithfulness +0.0130, p < 0.0001). Improvement pathways were model-dependent, with GPT-4o improving primarily through contradiction reduction while Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 2.5 Flash improved through increased entailment.
title: Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences
title_translated: 设计即忠实：面向多利益相关方受众的LLM生成临床试验摘要的评估与改进
summary_translated: 大语言模型越来越多地被用于为医疗提供者、患者和支付方总结临床试验结果，但其幻觉倾向在此高风险背景下带来显著风险。本研究提出一个基准评估框架，用于衡量LLM生成的临床试验摘要在三类利益相关方受众中的忠实度。该框架包含从ClinicalTrials.gov数据库聚合分析中提取的200个分层试验，采用受众特定的提示模板和六维度忠实度标注体系进行评估。对GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash三种模型生成的1,800份摘要进行基线测量，使用交叉编码器自然语言推理（NLI）模型评分。结果显示，所有模型中“未经支持的声明”是主导失效模式，平均标注得分为3分制中的1.55分。开发并评估了一个基于知识图谱增强的检索系统，相较于基线实现了统计显著的NLI忠实度提升（蕴含+0.0125，忠实度+0.0130，p < 0.0001）。改进路径因模型而异：GPT-4o主要通过减少矛盾改善，而Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash则通过提高蕴含程度实现改进。

summary: We present a language-model forecasting system for merger arbitrage, a specialized high-stakes financial setting in which the task is to predict the outcome of announced M\&A deals. Unlike prior work on judgmental forecasting with LLMs, which has focused on broad mixed-topic benchmarks and short context such as news snippets, we study a setting that requires long-context reasoning over hundreds of pages of technical documents. Our system combines expert-guided context engineering with finetuning on hindsight-guided reasoning traces derived from historical deals. Given an announced deal, it outputs a probability distribution over three mutually exclusive outcomes: closing at announced terms, a higher bid, or deal termination. On an out-of-sample set of more than 400 large deals spanning 42 countries, our finetuned system achieves the best performance of any method we evaluate, reducing class-balanced Brier score to 0.151. This is 24\% below calibrated market-implied probabilities, 19\% below XGBoost, and 25-42\% below frontier language models. These results, together with ablation studies, show that LLM-based forecasting can succeed in specialized, long-context financial workflows, with hindsight-based supervision and expert-designed context playing a critical role.
title: Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models
title_translated: 基于语言模型的全球并购套利预测
summary_translated: 我们提出一种语言模型预测系统，用于并购套利这一特殊且高风险的金融场景，其任务是预测已宣布并购交易的结果。与以往聚焦于广泛主题基准和短上下文（如新闻片段）的LLM判断预测研究不同，我们研究的是需要对数百页技术文档进行长上下文推理的场景。我们的系统结合专家引导的上下文工程与基于历史交易事后推理轨迹的微调。给定一个已宣布的交易，系统输出三个互斥结果的概率分布：按宣布条款完成、更高出价或交易终止。在涵盖42个国家超过400笔大型交易的样本外数据集上，微调后的系统表现优于我们评估的所有方法，将类别平衡的Brier得分降至0.151。这比校准后的市场隐含概率低24%，比XGBoost低19%，比前沿语言模型低25%-42%。这些结果结合消融实验表明，基于LLM的预测在专业化、长上下文金融工作流中可以成功，事后监督和专家设计的上下文起着关键作用。

summary: Recommender systems increasingly face a choice among heterogeneous agents -- collaborative filters, sequential models, content-based retrievers, and LLM-based rerankers -- yet no single agent is uniformly best. We study this choice as task-aware agent ranking under cost constraints using RouteRec, a framework that compares request-level hard selection with item-level learned aggregation over four traditional recommender agents and one LLM reranker agent. On MovieLens-1M, the full quality oracle has substantial headroom (HR@10 = 0.584), confirming that useful cross-agent signal exists. Under a leakage-free 5-fold out-of-fold protocol, however, hard selection remains below BM25 (0.223 vs. 0.254), and selective LLM escalation does not improve it. The same protocol yields a different outcome for learned aggregation: its cheap-only variant matches BM25 in HR and has a higher NDCG point estimate (0.123 vs. 0.114), while gated all-agent aggregation reaches HR@10 = 0.295 with 70.2\% LLM calls. The resulting lesson is not that routing is solved, but that request-level selection of one complete agent list is too coarse for this sparse fixed-candidate setting; item-level aggregation is the more promising action space.
title: RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at AgentSearch 2026 (The First Workshop on Indexing, Retrieval, and Ranking of AI Agents), co-located with SIGIR 2026
title_translated: RouteRec：推荐智能体选择与聚合的严格评估
summary_translated: 推荐系统日益面临在异构智能体之间做出选择的问题——包括协同过滤、序列模型、基于内容的检索器以及基于LLM的重排序器，但没有单一智能体始终最优。我们以任务感知的智能体排序视角，在成本约束下研究这一选择问题，提出RouteRec框架，比较请求级硬选择与项目级学习聚合，涵盖四种传统推荐智能体和一个LLM重排序智能体。在MovieLens-1M数据集上，完整质量基准具有显著提升空间（HR@10 = 0.584），证实跨智能体信号存在。然而，在无泄露的五折交叉验证协议下，硬选择仍低于BM25（0.223 vs. 0.254），且选择性启用LLM也无法改善。同一协议下，学习聚合则呈现不同结果：其仅低成本版本在HR上匹配BM25，且NDCG点估计更高（0.123 vs. 0.114）；而门控全智能体聚合达到HR@10 = 0.295，同时仅使用70.2%的LLM调用。由此得出的启示并非路由问题已解决，而是请求级选择单一完整智能体列表对于此稀疏固定候选场景过于粗糙；项目级聚合才是更具前景的动作空间。

summary: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens; Index-1.9B-Pure, a control variant trained with an identical recipe but with all instruction-like data strictly filtered from the corpus; Index-1.9B-Chat, aligned from the base model with supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization; and Index-1.9B-Character, which augments the chat model with retrieval-augmented generation for few-shot role-playing customization. Pre-training employs a Warmup-Stable-Decay learning-rate schedule in which the concentration of curated data is raised substantially during the decay phase, together with a Norm-Head output layer that stabilizes training under large learning rates. On a suite of standard benchmarks covering examination, reasoning, mathematics, and code, Index-1.9B-Base attains an average score of 64.92, competitive with or exceeding open models of several times its size. We further report controlled studies on model depth, learning-rate magnitude and scheduling, the interaction between learning-rate decay and data quality, and the effect of including instruction data during pre-training, and we document an unexplained surge in benchmark performance midway through the constant-learning-rate phase. All models, together with evaluation code, are released at https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B.
title: Index SLM Technical Report
title_translated: Index SLM 技术报告
summary_translated: 我们介绍了由Bilibili开发的一系列开源小型语言模型Index-1.9B。该系列包含四个模型：Index-1.9B-Base，一个具有19亿个非嵌入参数的基础模型，在2.8万亿个以中文和英文为主的token上进行预训练；Index-1.9B-Pure，一个控制变量模型，使用相同的训练方法但严格过滤掉所有指令类数据；Index-1.9B-Chat，通过监督微调和直接偏好优化从基础模型对齐得到；以及Index-1.9B-Character，通过检索增强生成技术增强聊天模型，实现少样本角色扮演定制。预训练采用Warmup-Stable-Decay学习率调度策略，其中在衰减阶段显著提高精选数据的浓度，并结合Norm-Head输出层，在大学习率下稳定训练。在涵盖考试、推理、数学和代码的标准基准测试中，Index-1.9B-Base平均得分为64.92，与规模数倍于自身的开源模型相比具有竞争力或更优。我们还报告了关于模型深度、学习率大小与调度、学习率衰减与数据质量交互作用，以及在预训练中包含指令数据的影响的受控研究，并记录到在恒定学习率阶段中期出现未解释的基准性能激增现象。所有模型及评估代码已发布于https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B。

summary: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required for clinical Question Answering (QA). Existing benchmarks primarily focus on regularly sampled time-series QA or medical QA over static data, and therefore rarely assess whether models can faithfully ground their answers in irregular temporal observations. To fill this gap, we introduce CLIR-Bench, a benchmark for irregular clinical time series QA constructed from de-identified ICU records through a principled four-stage pipeline. CLIR-Bench contains 6,600 QA instances spanning 11 clinical variables, organized into four capability dimensions and 11 tasks. Each question is linked to explicit temporal evidence and task-specific answer derivation rules, enabling evaluation of both answer accuracy and evidence use. Experiments show that existing generalist models struggle to retrieve and reason over sparse clinical evidence, highlighting the need for stronger irregular time-series reasoning methods. Our code and data are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/winall/CLIR-Bench.
title: CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series
title_translated: CLIR-Bench：面向不规则临床时间序列的多模态问答评测基准
summary_translated: 临床时间序列在患者监测、风险评估和临床决策支持中至关重要。然而，它们通常稀疏、采样不规则且异步，使得模型难以识别临床问答（QA）所需的时序证据。现有基准主要关注规则采样的时间序列问答或静态数据上的医学问答，因此很少评估模型是否能忠实基于不规则的时间观测进行回答。为填补这一空白，我们引入CLIR-Bench，一个基于去标识化ICU记录，通过系统性四阶段流程构建的不规则临床时间序列问答基准。CLIR-Bench包含6,600个问答实例，覆盖11个临床变量，组织为四个能力维度和11项任务。每个问题均关联明确的时序证据和特定任务的答案推导规则，支持对答案准确性和证据使用情况的评估。实验表明，现有通用模型在检索和推理稀疏临床证据方面表现不佳，凸显了更强的不规则时间序列推理方法的必要性。我们的代码和数据可在https://huggingface.co/datasets/winall/CLIR-Bench获取。

summary: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose prompt-level mitigations. We argue that the same biases admit a representation-level account in the judge's hidden state, complementary to the input-output view and operationally useful in ways it does not afford. We report three findings, across seven judges, seven bias types, and nine benchmarks. Geometry: baseline judging inputs occupy a tight activation manifold while biased inputs are displaced along a low-dimensional, type-specific subspace that sharpens with depth and is recovered consistently by three families of estimators. Causal control: steering hidden states along this subspace drives scoring in both directions, forward shifts reproducing biased scoring on clean inputs and reverse shifts restoring baseline scoring on biased ones, while matched-norm random directions produce shifts an order of magnitude smaller. Operational: a simple linear projection onto the same bias-direction features anticipates judge failures on three entirely unseen benchmarks, substantially outperforming text-based alternatives. Reading bias as activation geometry, rather than as input-output noise, unifies geometric structure, causal control, and operational prediction within a single framework. The project page is available at https://xzx34.github.io/unfair-judge/
title: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias
comment: 58 pages, 13 figures, 30 tables; project page: this https URL
title_translated: 不公平裁判的内部机制：大语言模型作为裁判偏见的可解释性分析
summary_translated: 现有针对大语言模型作为裁判评分偏见的研究主要停留在输入-输出层面：扰动输入、测量分数变化并提出提示层面的缓解方案。我们认为，同样的偏见在裁判的隐藏状态中存在表征层面的解释，这种解释与输入-输出视角互补，并在操作上具有独特价值。我们在七个裁判、七种偏见类型和九个基准上报告了三项发现。几何结构：基线判断输入占据紧密的激活流形，而有偏输入则沿低维、类型特异的子空间发生位移，且随网络深度增强，三种估计器家族均可一致恢复该子空间。因果控制：沿着此子空间操纵隐藏状态可双向驱动评分，正向移动再现干净输入上的偏见评分，反向移动则恢复有偏输入上的基线评分，而匹配范数的随机方向仅产生小一个数量级的偏差。操作性：对同一偏见方向特征进行简单线性投影，即可预测裁判在三个完全未见过的基准上的失败，显著优于基于文本的替代方案。将阅读偏见视为激活几何而非输入-输出噪声，统一了几何结构、因果控制与操作预测于单一框架之中。项目页面见https://xzx34.github.io/unfair-judge/

summary: Shared meaning in language requires people to learn and agree on categories. We ask how characteristics of agents' memories change the emergence and evolution of shared meaning. Without a coordination game, models of conceptual semantics cannot explain how shared meaning emerges and changes in groups of people; however, existing games assume that players share payoffs in a partnership setting. We model conceptual alignment as a non-partnership game and illustrate differences in actual and perceived conceptual convergence from counterfactual simulations using agents with varying levels of adaptiveness and memory degradation. We found that adaptive players achieved actual convergence faster and had closer final conceptual regions than non-adaptive players, while non-adaptive players perceived convergence earlier. Weighing novel information less over time resulted in more stable agreements than fixing the weight of novel information. Memory features are critical to the emergence and evolution of actual and perceived convergence.
title: Forgetting Our Way to Shared Meaning: Effects of Forgetting on Conceptual Alignment in a Non-Partnership Coordination Game
title_translated: 遗忘之路通向共同意义：遗忘对非合作协调游戏中概念对齐的影响
summary_translated: 语言中的共同意义需要人们学习并就类别达成一致。我们探讨代理记忆特性如何影响共同意义的涌现与演化。在缺乏协调游戏的情境下，现有概念语义模型无法解释群体中共同意义如何产生与变化；然而，现有游戏假设玩家处于合作型收益共享情境。我们建模为非合作博弈中的概念对齐，并通过不同适应性与记忆退化水平的代理进行反事实模拟，揭示实际与感知概念收敛的差异。研究发现，适应性玩家更快实现实际收敛，最终概念区域更接近；而非适应性玩家则更早感知到收敛。随着时间推移降低新信息权重，比固定新信息权重更能促进稳定共识。记忆特征对于实际与感知收敛的涌现与演化至关重要。

summary: A theoretical understanding of Transformers is crucial to better understand the capacities and limitations of large language models (LLMs). There is much work analyzing the expressivity of attention-based models. By proposing handcrafted weights or using computational complexity arguments, a large amount of past theoretical works have sought to characterize which tasks are and which are not in the hypothesis class of Transformer models. However, little work investigates the learnability of such solutions. In this work, we make progress towards this goal. Inspired by recent loss landscape analysis work, we propose preliminary sample complexity bounds for learning C-RASP constructions with Transformers.
title: From Expressivity to Sample Complexity: Narrow Teachers for Transformers via C-RASP
title_translated: 从表达能力到样本复杂度：通过C-RASP实现Transformer的窄教师设计
summary_translated: 对Transformer的理论理解对于深入理解大语言模型（LLM）的能力与局限至关重要。已有大量工作分析基于注意力模型的表达能力。通过手工设计权重或使用计算复杂性论证，许多早期理论研究试图界定哪些任务属于Transformer模型的假设类，哪些不属于。然而，极少研究关注此类解决方案的可学习性。本文在此方向取得进展。受近期损失景观分析工作的启发，我们提出了学习C-RASP构造的初步样本复杂度边界。

summary: Human choice behavior, including route choice, exhibits systematic behavioral biases that deviate from the assumptions of full rationality. Cumulative prospect theory (CPT) has been widely recognized as an effective framework for characterizing such behavioral patterns. However, its large-scale application, particularly in simulation and agent-based modeling, critically depends on specifying individual-level CPT parameters, which remain a major bottleneck. Conventional approaches typically rely on surveys and controlled experiments to calibrate CPT parameters, yet these methods are difficult to generalize and often fail to capture the full diversity of human decision-making. To address this challenge, this paper investigates whether large language models (LLMs) can reproduce human behavioral biases in choice-making without explicit specification of prospect-theoretic parameters. Using route choice as a representative scenario, we design a behavioral evaluation framework and systematically compare LLM-generated decisions with established human behavioral patterns predicted by CPT. Experimental results demonstrate that LLMs are capable of reproducing non-rational human choice biases and can exhibit decision behaviors consistent with prospect-theoretic effects under uncertainty. These findings suggest that generative AI models may provide a scalable alternative for modeling human decision processes and offer a promising foundation for next-generation large-scale agent-based simulation and AI-driven behavioral research.
title: Reproducing human biases in route choice using large language models: Toward scalable behavioral modeling
title_translated: 使用大语言模型再现人类路径选择中的认知偏差：迈向可扩展的行为建模
summary_translated: 人类选择行为（包括路径选择）表现出系统性的认知偏差，偏离了完全理性的假设。累积前景理论（CPT）被广泛认为是描述此类行为模式的有效框架。然而，其大规模应用（特别是在模拟和基于代理的建模中）严重依赖于个体层面的CPT参数设定，这仍是主要瓶颈。传统方法通常依赖调查和受控实验来校准CPT参数，但这些方法难以泛化，且往往无法捕捉人类决策的全部多样性。为解决这一挑战，本文研究大语言模型（LLMs）是否能在不显式指定前景理论参数的情况下再现人类决策中的认知偏差。以路径选择为典型场景，我们设计了一个行为评估框架，并系统比较LLM生成的决策与CPT预测的人类行为模式。实验结果表明，LLMs能够再现非理性的认知偏差，并在不确定性下表现出与前景理论效应一致的决策行为。这些发现表明，生成式AI模型可能为建模人类决策过程提供一种可扩展的替代方案，为下一代大规模基于代理的仿真和AI驱动的行为研究奠定基础。

summary: Aphasia following stroke commonly produces systematic naming errors with characteristic profiles, but whether general-purpose language models not designed for clinical simulation can reproduce these patterns remains untested. We investigated (1) whether lesions or controlled perturbations to a multimodal language model can reproduce different types of errors in picture naming, and (2) whether the framework can reproduce the complete error profile of individual persons with aphasia (PWAs). Using LLaVA 1.6, we evaluated perturbation configurations that varied the layer, proportion, and amount of noise applied to model units. We examined 278 PWAs on the Philadelphia Naming Test, classifying responses into seven categories using a validated neural classifier. Six of seven response categories (correct, semantic, mixed, unrelated, neologism, no response errors) emerged at clinically-comparable proportions across distinct parameter space regions, with formal paraphasia being the exception. Searching the perturbation space revealed configurations that reproduced the individual error profile in at least six of seven categories for 97.8% of PWAs and in all seven categories for 79.5% of PWAs. Monte Carlo baselines confirmed that this matching reflects joint inter-category structure rather than marginal overlap. These results establish a quantitative framework for reproducing individual aphasic error patterns in picture naming. They suggest the potential for language models to serve as digital twins of individuals with post-stroke aphasia.
title: Lesioned Multimodal Language Models Reproduce Aphasic Picture-Naming Patterns
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures; supplementary materials (18 pages, 6 sections) included
title_translated: 受损的多模态语言模型再现失语症患者的图片命名错误模式
summary_translated: 中风后失语症常导致系统性命名错误并具有特定的特征模式，但通用语言模型（未专为临床模拟设计）能否再现这些模式仍未经验证。我们研究了（1）对多模态语言模型施加损伤或受控扰动是否能再现不同类型的图片命名错误，以及（2）该框架能否再现个体失语症患者（PWAs）的完整错误模式。使用LLaVA 1.6，我们评估了不同层、比例和噪声强度作用于模型单元的扰动配置。我们对278名失语症患者在费城命名测试中的表现进行分析，采用经过验证的神经分类器将回答分为七类。在不同的参数空间区域中，六类错误（正确、语义错误、混合错误、无关错误、新词错误、无回答错误）以临床上可比的比例出现，仅正式错语例外。在扰动空间中搜索发现，97.8%的患者至少在六类中重现了个体错误模式，79.5%的患者在全部七类中均实现重现。蒙特卡洛基线验证表明，这种匹配反映的是类别间联合结构而非边际重叠。这些结果建立了一个定量框架，用于再现个体失语症患者的图片命名错误模式，提示语言模型可能作为中风后失语症个体的数字孪生体。

summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) optimizes LLMs using sparse verifiable final-answer rewards. This sparse anchor reliably verifies whether a trajectory succeeds but provides no direct feedback on the reasoning path that produced it. Before success, prerequisite progress on hard problems receives no reward signal; after success, outcome rewards cannot distinguish well-organized correct trajectories from redundant or locally flawed ones. We introduce SCOPE-RL (Scaffolded Chain Optimization with Process Efficiency), a two-stage framework that densifies this anchor while retaining the GRPO update: Adaptive Scaffolded RL adds prefix-decomposed verifiable rewards on answer-hidden sub-question chains before success, and Quality-Aware Process RL applies correctness-gated process-shape rewards to refine correct trajectories after success. An expert-validated Step-Quality Evaluation Protocol evaluates useful-step density, error localization, and token efficiency beyond final-answer accuracy. On Qwen3-8B-Instruct trained on DAPO-Math and Big-Math, SCOPE-RL improves average accuracy by up to 11.2 pp and reduces reasoning tokens by up to 27.1% over outcome-only GRPO; the gains hold under GSPO and on Qwen3-0.6B-Instruct, indicating that reward-signal densification is complementary to policy-update-level RLVR advances. Code and data are available at https://github.com/tokencraft-lab/SCOPE-RL.
title: SCOPE-RL: Optimizing Reasoning Paths Before and After Success
title_translated: SCOPE-RL：成功前后的推理路径优化
summary_translated: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）通过稀疏的可验证最终答案奖励来优化大语言模型。这种稀疏锚点可靠地验证轨迹是否成功，但无法直接反馈产生该结果的推理路径。在成功之前，复杂问题的前期进展得不到奖励信号；成功之后，结果奖励无法区分组织良好正确的轨迹与冗余或局部有缺陷的轨迹。我们提出SCOPE-RL（分层链路优化与过程效率），一种两阶段框架，在保留GRPO更新机制的同时对奖励信号进行密集化处理：自适应分层强化学习在成功前对答案隐藏的子问题链添加前缀分解的可验证奖励，质量感知过程强化学习则在成功后对正确轨迹应用基于正确性的过程形状奖励以进行优化。通过专家验证的步骤质量评估协议，评估有用步骤密度、错误定位能力和令牌效率，超越最终答案准确率。在Qwen3-8B-Instruct上训练于DAPO-Math和Big-Math数据集，SCOPE-RL相比仅基于结果的GRPO，平均准确率提升最高达11.2个百分点，推理令牌减少最多27.1%；该优势在GSPO设置及Qwen3-0.6B-Instruct上依然成立，表明奖励信号密集化与策略更新级的RLVR进展具有互补性。代码与数据可在https://github.com/tokencraft-lab/SCOPE-RL获取。

summary: Safety alignment in large language models can be fragile under fine-tuning, as even benign task adaptation may increase harmful compliance. Existing defenses mainly follow two directions: they either intervene during or after fine-tuning through retraining or weight modification, which can be costly and may hurt task performance, or they use model-agnostic safety classifiers, which may miss failures specific to a given fine-tuned checkpoint. These limitations motivate a post hoc, model-specific, and non-invasive approach to safety restoration. To meet these requirements, we propose HyperSafe, a framework that restores safety behavior by generating a model-specific Safe Side Network (SSN) for each fine-tuned checkpoint. HyperSafe uses layer-wise activation fingerprints to capture how fine-tuning changes the model's inner representations. With a small set of given calibration prompts, the hypernetwork maps these fingerprints to the parameters of the \ssn{} in a single forward pass. The generated \ssn{} runs alongside the frozen fine-tuned model and performs prompt-level safety classification: harmful prompts are routed to refusal, while safe prompts are answered by the original fine-tuned model. Thus, HyperSafe requires no gradient updates, no safety data at deployment time, and no modification to the deployed model weights. We evaluate HyperSafe on two model families, Qwen2-7B and LLaMA-3-8B, across multiple safety benchmarks. HyperSafe reduces harmful response rates from 19-31% to below 1% on every held-out checkpoint, while keeping downstream task accuracy within 1% of the fine-tuned baseline on average. Code is available at https://github.com/nokronim/project-safety-remedy.
title: HyperSafe: Inference-Time Safety Recovery for Fine-Tuned Language Models
title_translated: HyperSafe：微调后语言模型的推理时安全恢复机制
summary_translated: 大型语言模型的安全对齐在微调过程中可能变得脆弱，因为即使是良性任务适配也可能增加有害响应的倾向。现有防御方法主要沿两个方向：要么在微调期间或之后通过再训练或权重修改进行干预，这成本高昂且可能损害任务性能；要么使用模型无关的安全分类器，但可能遗漏特定微调检查点特有的失败模式。这些局限促使我们提出一种事后、模型特定且非侵入性的安全恢复方法。为此，我们提出HyperSafe框架，通过为每个微调检查点生成一个模型特定的安全侧网络（SSN）来恢复安全行为。HyperSafe利用逐层激活指纹捕捉微调如何改变模型内部表征。通过少量校准提示，超网络在一次前向传播中将这些指纹映射为SSN的参数。生成的SSN与冻结的微调模型并行运行，执行提示级别的安全分类：有害提示被引导至拒绝回答，而安全提示则由原始微调模型作答。因此，HyperSafe无需梯度更新、部署时无需安全数据，也无需修改已部署模型权重。我们在Qwen2-7B和LLaMA-3-8B两个模型家族上进行了评估，覆盖多个安全基准。HyperSafe将有害响应率从19%-31%降至所有保留检查点均低于1%，同时保持下游任务准确率在微调基线的1%以内。代码可在https://github.com/nokronim/project-safety-remedy获取。

summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs) have enabled increasingly capable digital agents for computer use. However, real-world tasks are often long-horizon and involve evolving contexts containing accumulated observations, intermediate edits, failed attempts, and partially completed executions. Existing agents typically operate over raw interaction history, making task progress difficult to interpret, verify, and recover, which ultimately limits reliable long-horizon execution. In this paper, we argue that addressing this challenge requires explicitly structuring both the agent's state and workflow around a unified causal representation of task progress. We present \textbf{StructAgent}, a state-centered framework that introduces a unified state for maintaining compact, verifiable task progress and a structured workflow that regulates progress through verifier-backed state transitions. Building on this design, StructAgent further enables explicit progress checkpointing, evidence-driven task completion, targeted failure recovery, and tool-supported execution, while ensuring that all progress updates remain grounded in verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StructAgent consistently improves a wide range of LLM and VLM backbones on long-horizon computer-use tasks. On OSWorld-Verified, it improves Qwen3.5-9B from 27.0\% to 46.9\% success rate and Qwen3.5-27B from 31.6\% to 62.2\%, while achieving a new open-source state of the art of 78.9\% with MiniMax-M3. Moreover, the same framework generalizes beyond desktop environments to Minecraft, demonstrating the generality of our design.
title: StructAgent: Harness Long-horizon Digital Agents with Unified Causal Structure
title_translated: StructAgent：通过统一因果结构驾驭长周期数字智能体
summary_translated: 近年来，大语言模型（LLMs）和视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的进步使得数字智能体在计算机操作方面的能力日益增强。然而，现实世界任务通常是长周期的，涉及不断演化的上下文，包含累积的观察、中间编辑、失败尝试和部分执行。现有智能体通常基于原始交互历史运行，导致任务进展难以解释、验证和恢复，最终限制了可靠长周期执行。本文主张，解决这一挑战需要围绕任务进展的统一因果表示，显式结构化智能体的状态和工作流程。我们提出	extbf{StructAgent}，一种以状态为中心的框架，引入统一状态以维护紧凑、可验证的任务进展，并通过验证器支持的状态转换调节进度。基于此设计，StructAgent进一步实现了显式的进度检查点、证据驱动的任务完成、针对性的失败恢复以及工具支持的执行，同时确保所有进展更新始终基于验证。大量实验证明，StructAgent在多种LLM和VLM骨干模型上持续提升了长周期计算机使用任务的表现。在OSWorld-Verified上，它将Qwen3.5-9B的成功率从27.0%提升至46.9%，Qwen3.5-27B从31.6%提升至62.2%，并在MiniMax-M3上达到78.9%的新开源最佳水平。此外，同一框架在Minecraft环境中也展现出泛化能力，证明了我们设计的通用性。

summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as conversational tutors, they risk institutionalizing systemic inequalities. This study presents a systematic API audit of four LLMs acting as history tutors, evaluating 1,800 responses regarding the 1989 Romanian Revolution across five student personas varying by ethnicity and socio-economic tier. We uncover four interconnected patterns of \emph{epistemic paternalism}: (1)~\textbf{Differential Refusal}, where safety-aligned models block 76.7\% of educational requests from low-tier students; (2)~\textbf{Epistemic Gatekeeping}, evidenced by a 3$\times$ reduction in access to geopolitical complexity (e.g., the contested ``coup theory'') for marginalized learners; (3)~\textbf{Agency Theft}, a lexical shift where models like LLaMA produce a 5$\times$ higher victimization-to-politics vocabulary ratio for Roma students compared to elite peers; and (4)~\textbf{Elite Hermeneutics}, where AI tutors disproportionately withhold epistemic confidence and justification scores from low-resource demographic profiles. We argue that current safety alignment acts as a paternalistic filter, transforming conversational AI into agents of narrative segregation -- a manifestation of \emph{hermeneutical injustice} in Fricker's~\cite{fricker2007} sense that demands urgent pedagogical auditing.
title: The Paternalistic Filter: Epistemic Injustice and Differential Refusal in LLM-Mediated History Education for Marginalized Romanian Students
comment: 8th International Workshop on Culturally-Aware Tutoring Systems (HAL precedings)
title_translated: 父权式过滤：大型语言模型在罗马尼亚边缘化学生历史教育中的认识论不公与差异化拒绝
summary_translated: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被用作对话式导师，它们可能加剧系统性不平等。本研究对四个充当历史导师的LLM进行了系统的API审计，评估了针对五种不同族裔和经济社会阶层学生人物的1800条关于1989年罗马尼亚革命的回答。我们发现了四种相互关联的‘认识论父权主义’模式：（1）差异化拒绝，安全对齐的模型阻止了76.7%来自低层级学生的教育请求；（2）认识论把关，表现为边缘化学习者在获取地缘政治复杂性（如有争议的“政变理论”）方面的访问减少了3倍；（3）主体性剥夺，模型如LLaMA在罗姆人学生中表现出比精英同龄人高出5倍的受害者-政治词汇比例；（4）精英诠释学，AI导师对资源匮乏群体的元知识信心和论证评分明显偏低。我们认为，当前的安全对齐实际上是一种父权式过滤机制，使对话式AI成为叙事隔离的代理——这是Fricker所定义的‘解释性不公’的表现，亟需进行紧急的教育审计。

summary: In the rapidly evolving landscape of information retrieval systems, the ability to adapt and improve through user feedback is paramount. This study introduces a novel methodology for refining the performance of a primary Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system by strategically integrating an auxiliary feedback RAG system. By systematically harnessing human-generated feedback, the approach aims to enhance the accuracy, relevance, and overall quality of responses, driving the system towards self-improvement. Central to this methodology is a human-in-the-loop implementation, where user feedback is continuously collected, classified, and integrated into the inference workflow, enabling the system to learn and evolve iteratively. To validate the effectiveness of this approach, the study employs rigorous testing against three diverse benchmark datasets focused on general and custom domain knowledge, utilizing a LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation strategy. This comprehensive framework not only underscores the transformative potential of feedback-driven enhancements in RAG systems but also sets a precedent for future research in adaptive information retrieval technologies, marking a significant step in the journey towards autonomous refinement and optimization through user engagement.
title: Enhancing LLMs through human feedback: a journey towards self-improvement
comment: AIC 2025: The 10th International Workshop on Artificial Intelligence and Cognition (held as part of ECAI 2025). October 25-26, 2025. Bologna, Italy
title_translated: 通过人类反馈增强大模型：迈向自我改进的旅程
summary_translated: 在信息检索系统快速演进的背景下，通过用户反馈实现适应与改进的能力至关重要。本研究提出一种新颖的方法，通过战略性整合一个辅助反馈RAG系统来优化主RAG系统的性能。通过系统性地利用人类生成的反馈，该方法旨在提升响应的准确性、相关性和整体质量，推动系统向自我改进发展。该方法的核心是‘人在回路’的实现方式，即持续收集、分类并整合用户反馈到推理流程中，使系统能够迭代学习与演化。为验证该方法的有效性，研究在三个涵盖通用和特定领域知识的基准数据集上进行了严格测试，并采用LLM作为裁判的评估策略。这一综合框架不仅凸显了反馈驱动增强在RAG系统中的变革潜力，也为未来自适应信息检索技术的研究树立了先例，标志着通过用户参与实现自主优化的重要一步。

summary: We address ambivalence and hesitancy (A/H) recognition in the ABAW 2026 BAH Challenge: given a short interview video, predict whether the person shows signs of A/H. Our system combines affect-specialised text, audio, and visual representations with a small set of readable linguistic hesitation cues, fused by a reliability gate we call Affective Marker Fusion (AMF), and finished with a simple AP-weighted ensemble at a fixed decision threshold. We also introduce \emph{ASR-erased time}: speech recognisers delete fillers and hesitation pauses from the transcript, but the chunk timestamps keep the time those events took, and sixteen features built from these gaps form the strongest and most independent non-verbal channel we measured (AP $0.718$, correlation $0.11$--$0.36$ with all other members). Across controlled experiments we find three things: cross-modal conflict design does not reliably help on BAH; language is by far the strongest channel while affect-specialised audio is a useful second; and calibration matters more than architecture. Fitting ensemble weights and a threshold on the small validation split overfits: it scores $0.741$ macro-F1 on validation but only $0.690$ on the untouched test set. AP-weighting at a fixed threshold instead reaches $\mathbf{0.731}$ on test.
title: Simple Features and Honest Calibration for Ambivalence and Hesitancy Recognition in Video
title_translated: 用于视频中犹豫与矛盾识别的简单特征与诚实校准
summary_translated: 我们针对ABAW 2026 BAH挑战赛中的矛盾与犹豫（A/H）识别问题展开研究：给定一段简短访谈视频，预测其中人物是否表现出A/H迹象。我们的系统结合了专攻情感的文本、音频和视觉表示，以及一组可读的语言性犹豫线索，通过一个称为情感标记融合（AMF）的可靠性门控进行融合，并在固定决策阈值下使用简单的AP加权集成完成预测。我们还引入了‘ASR擦除时间’：语音识别器会从转录文本中删除填充词和犹豫停顿，但保留这些事件的时间戳，由此生成的十六个特征构成了我们测量中最强大且最独立的非语言通道（AP 0.718，与其他所有成员的相关性为0.11–0.36）。在受控实验中我们发现：跨模态冲突设计在BAH任务中并未显著提升效果；语言是远最强的信号通道，而专攻情感的音频是有效的第二选择；校准比架构更重要。在小规模验证集上拟合集成权重和阈值会导致过拟合：验证集得分0.741宏F1，但在未触碰的测试集上仅得0.690。采用固定阈值的AP加权则在测试集上达到0.731。

summary: Statute retrieval is a fundamental task in legal information retrieval, yet existing approaches struggle to bridge the gap between colloquial legal queries and formal statutory language. In this paper, we propose GCSR, a generative statute retrieval framework that reformulates statute retrieval as a sequence generation problem and internalizes statutory knowledge into a generative model. Specifically, we propose a multi-granularity structured docid that encodes legal hierarchy and semantic information, together with a multi-task training strategy. Experiments show that GCSR consistently outperforms strong sparse, dense, and legal-domain baselines. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of generative retrieval for statute retrieval and highlight its potential for broader legal information access and downstream legal reasoning tasks.
title: Generative Chinese Statute Retrieval
title_translated: 生成式中文法律条文检索
summary_translated: 法律条文检索是法律信息检索中的基础任务，但现有方法难以弥合口语化法律查询与正式法条语言之间的差距。本文提出GCSR，一种生成式条文检索框架，将条文检索重构为序列生成问题，并将法条知识内化至生成模型中。具体而言，我们提出了多粒度结构化文档ID，以编码法律层级与语义信息，并采用多任务训练策略。实验表明，GCSR在多个强基线（包括稀疏、密集及法律领域专用模型）上均表现更优。结果证明了生成式检索在条文检索中的有效性，并展示了其在更广泛的法律信息获取及下游法律推理任务中的潜力。

summary: Tool-using LLM agents are mostly evaluated assuming all tools work. When a tool times out, returns a week-stale value, or has its description poisoned in deployment, the developer needs a controlled way to reproduce the failure, test a fix, and confirm the fix worked before deployment. We present AgentCheck, an open-source web workbench that turns an MCP server into an intervention surface. AgentCheck runs an agent against its real tools and records every tool response, then re-runs the agent with the response perturbed by a fault (12 types) injector. Matching tool calls are replayed from cache, and later tool calls go live after the agent diverges. This yields a reproduce-intervene-confirm loop: the developer toggles a mitigation, re-runs against the identical fault, and sees if the failure goes away. Scoring has two parts: deterministic pass/fail rules, plus an LLM judge for interpretive labels, validated against human annotations. Across five agents, the best passes 105/120 scenarios and the weakest only 77. The failures are usually silent, confident use of incorrect tool outputs rather than crashes. On the weakest agent, a retry mitigation raises success on timeout error faults from as few as 30% of cases to 100%, whereas stale-data faults remain near 3-4 of 10 regardless of the mitigation. AgentCheck makes these failure modes reproducible, comparable, and verifiable before deployment.
title: AgentCheck: A Reproduce-Intervene-Mitigate Workbench for LLM Agents over MCP
title_translated: AgentCheck：面向MCP上LLM智能体的可复现-干预-缓解工作台
summary_translated: 使用工具的LLM智能体通常在假设所有工具均正常工作的前提下进行评估。当某个工具超时、返回过期数据或部署中描述被污染时，开发者需要一种可控的方式来复现故障、测试修复方案，并在部署前确认修复有效。我们提出AgentCheck，一个开源Web工作台，将MCP服务器转变为干预界面。AgentCheck运行智能体与其真实工具交互并记录每次工具响应，随后重新运行智能体，由故障注入器对响应进行扰动（共12种类型）。匹配的工具调用从缓存中重放，后续调用在智能体发生分歧后实时执行。这形成了一个可复现-干预-确认的闭环：开发者切换缓解策略，再次运行相同故障，观察故障是否消失。评分包含两部分：确定性通过/失败规则，以及经人工标注验证的LLM裁判用于解释性标签。在五个智能体中，最佳者通过105/120场景，最弱者仅通过77。失败通常表现为沉默地自信使用错误工具输出，而非崩溃。在最弱智能体上，重试缓解策略将超时错误场景的成功率从最低30%提升至100%，而过期数据故障仍维持在约3-4/10，无论采取何种缓解措施。AgentCheck使得这些故障模式在部署前变得可复现、可比较、可验证。

summary: Machine learning progress is often attributed to scaling model size and dataset volume, yet the composition of data can be just as consequential. Empirical findings repeatedly show that combining datasets from different domains yields nontrivial interactions. For instance, adding code improves mathematical reasoning, while certain mixtures introduce interference that reduces model performance. We refer to these effects collectively as data synergy, where the contribution of multiple domains exceeds or falls short of the sum of their isolated contributions. In this work, we formalize and quantify data synergy in language model pretraining. Leveraging observational variation across open-weight LLMs with diverse pretraining mixtures, we estimate both direct domain-to-benchmark synergy (how one domain contributes to performance on another) and a second-order domain-domain synergy (capabilities that require co-occurrence of multiple domains). Our framework improves predictive accuracy over domain-agnostic scaling laws and recovers stable synergy estimates. We validate these estimates by training models on predicted optimal and predicted anti-optimal mixtures and confirm that our synergy estimates correctly predict performance rankings.
title: Domain-Aware Scaling Laws Uncover Data Synergy
title_translated: 领域感知的缩放定律揭示数据协同效应
summary_translated: 机器学习的进步通常归因于模型规模和数据量的扩大，但数据构成同样至关重要。实证研究反复表明，来自不同领域的数据组合会产生非平凡的相互作用。例如，加入代码数据可提升数学推理能力，而某些混合数据会引入干扰，降低模型性能。我们统称这些效应为数据协同效应，即多个领域的贡献超过或低于各自独立贡献之和。本文对语言模型预训练中的数据协同效应进行了形式化和量化。利用具有多样化预训练混合数据的开源大模型在观测上的差异，我们估计了直接的领域-基准协同效应（一个领域对另一个领域性能的贡献）以及二阶领域-领域协同效应（需要多个领域共现才能实现的能力）。我们的框架在预测准确性上优于无领域感知的缩放定律，并恢复出稳定的协同效应估计值。通过在预测最优和预测次优混合数据上训练模型进行验证，确认了我们的协同效应估计能正确预测性能排名。

summary: The test suites used as RLVR rewards for code have natural false positives: per-task, persistent, asymmetric errors that accept the same wrong programs every time they appear, unlike the symmetric or resampled noise assumed by existing noise-robustness analyses. We run a preregistered two-arm causal contrast on a deployed suite: GRPO on identical MBPP tasks, seeds, and compute, rewarded by the original MBPP tests (leaky) versus the MBPP+ extra tests (hardened). Two further families replicate the design under a preregistration frozen before their data existed. [C] The average held-out effect is bounded: non-inferior under a preregistered 1.5-pt margin (gap 0.20 pt, one-sided 95% upper bound 0.75 pt). [C] Rewarded false-positive mass tracks a cheap static leakiness audit computed before training (Spearman 0.80), and the registered train-side test puts the leak-stratum FP share +43.8 pt above clean tasks. [E] Auditing every rewarded FP under signed, human-adjudicated rules finds a large residual of verified genuinely wrong code: 47.57% record-weighted; both replication families reproduce a large share. The reward paid for real bugs, not merely suite artifacts. [E] Mechanism evidence is consistent with selection of pre-existing error modes rather than learned exploitation: FP incidence does not grow within our horizon, and untrained base models already produce the same wrong outputs under the leaky filter. We then turn the same instrument on the frontier judges themselves: on their own false positives they self-assess only weakly, a same-author test is unresolved, and even the highest-scoring reader we probe stays far below its score on a weaker policy's errors -- two subjects on MBPP, licensing nothing about frontier models in general. A cheap static audit locates exposure before training; hardening the reward removes the measurement inflation, though here it buys little capability.
title: When the Reward Suite Is Leaky: A Preregistered Causal Contrast of Natural Verifier False Positives in RLVR
comment: 37 pages, 2 figures. Code, frozen data, and complete audit records: this https URL
title_translated: 当奖励套件存在漏洞时：对RLVR中自然验证器误报的预先注册因果对比
summary_translated: 用于代码生成的强化学习验证（RLVR）所使用的测试套件存在天然的误报：每项任务中持续存在的、不对称的错误，会反复接受相同的错误程序，这与现有噪声鲁棒性分析所假设的对称或重采样噪声不同。我们在已部署的套件上执行了一项预先注册的双臂因果对比实验：在相同MBPP任务、种子和计算资源下，使用原始MBPP测试（有漏洞）与MBPP+额外测试（加固版）作为奖励的GRPO算法进行对比。另外两组实验在数据存在之前就预先注册了设计。[C] 平均保留效果受控：在预先注册的1.5分阈值内不劣于（单侧95%上限为0.75分，差距为0.20分）。[C] 奖励误报的分布与训练前计算的廉价静态漏洞审计高度相关（Spearman相关系数0.80），且注册的训练端测试显示，漏洞层级的误报占比比干净任务高出43.8个百分点。[E] 在签名的人工审核规则下审计所有被奖励的误报，发现大量真实错误代码仍被通过：记录加权比例达47.57%；两组复现实验均再现了高比例结果。奖励实际上支付给真实缺陷，而不仅仅是套件本身造成的伪影。[E] 机制证据支持对已有错误模式的选择，而非学习到的利用：在观察期内，误报率未上升，且未经训练的基础模型在漏洞过滤器下已产生相同的错误输出。随后，我们将同一工具应用于前沿评判者自身：他们在自身误报上的自我评估较弱，同一作者的测试无法解决，即使最高评分读者在弱策略错误上的表现也远低于其自身得分——两位MBPP参与者均未能提供关于前沿模型的一般性结论。廉价的静态审计可在训练前定位暴露风险；加固奖励可消除测量膨胀，但在此场景中带来的能力提升有限。

summary: AI agents are evolving from answer engines into persistent teams that use tools, delegate work, learn from experience, and modify the artifacts that shape their future behavior. The defining question for deployment is no longer merely what agents can do, but who controls what they are allowed to become. We introduce logos, a pluggable layer for self-evolution and governance that strengthens existing multiagent frameworks rather than replacing them. logos compiles heterogeneous multimodal inputs, including documents, images, audio, tables, databases, APIs, and human instructions into versioned agent packs containing agents, tools, knowledge, tests, permissions, and policies. During operation, it transforms agent activity into portable, auditable event traces and applies fail-closed verification across frameworks and backends. Every learned prompt, memory, skill, tool, role, or workflow remains an untrusted release candidate until held-out execution evidence, human-controlled policy, and explicit authorization permit its promotion. This architecture enables "verifiable human-agent loop engineering": agents can act, ask, learn, and propose improvements, while humans can steer objectives, permissions, approvals, and irreversible actions without interrupting continuous operation. logos provides a living logic for accountable automation. Agents may evolve at machine speed, but only evidence and human authority can close the loop.
title: LOGOS: A Living Logic for AI Agent Teams That Evolve With Humans
title_translated: LOGOS：一种随人类共同演化的AI代理团队动态逻辑
summary_translated: AI代理正从问答引擎演变为持久协作团队，能够使用工具、分配任务、从经验中学习，并修改塑造其未来行为的成果物。部署的核心问题不再仅仅是代理能做什么，而是谁控制它们被允许成为什么。我们提出LOGOS，一个可插拔的自演化与治理层，强化现有多代理框架而非取代它们。LOGOS将异构的多模态输入（包括文档、图像、音频、表格、数据库、API和人类指令）编译为版本化的代理包，包含代理、工具、知识、测试、权限和策略。运行期间，它将代理活动转化为可移植、可审计的事件轨迹，并在不同框架和后端间实施闭合失败验证。每一个学习到的提示、记忆、技能、工具、角色或工作流，在获得保留执行证据、人类控制的策略和明确授权之前，始终是不可信的候选版本。该架构实现了‘可验证的人机代理循环工程’：代理可以行动、提问、学习并提出改进，而人类可引导目标、权限、审批和不可逆操作，同时不中断连续运行。LOGOS为负责任的自动化提供了动态逻辑。代理可按机器速度演化，但只有证据和人类权威才能完成闭环。

summary: Multi-agent ensembling multiplies active parameters and inference cost without answering three basic questions: which agents to consult, how deeply a query should traverse a hierarchy of agents, and when inter-agent communication is worth its cost. We present GRADE (Gated Routing and Adaptive Depth for Efficient Reasoning), a hierarchical multi-agent system in which four lightweight learned gates jointly govern agent selection, hierarchy depth, inter-agent communication, and branch pruning. Training uses CoGRPO (Collaborative Group-Relative Policy Optimization), a novel critic-free recipe that adapts GRPO to multi-agent hierarchies and assigns a shared advantage signal to every gate and agent that participated in a rollout. Agent models are drawn from a hot-swappable Expert Registry; per-agent calibration maps allow experts to be replaced at inference time without retraining. At $\sim$17B average active parameters, GRADE outperforms all baselines on GSM8K, MMLUPro, and GPQA, surpassing the strongest baseline by 4.8 points on MMLUPro at half the active compute. On AIME-2025, where model depth dominates, GRADE remains competitive to existing frameworks. Ablations isolate the hierarchy and masked cross-attention as the largest contributors to accuracy, and show that per-agent calibration is necessary for safe hot-swapping.
title: Route, Communicate, and Reason: Gated Routing and Adaptive Depth for Efficient Multi-Agent Reasoning
title_translated: 规划、通信与推理：用于高效多代理推理的门控路由与自适应深度
summary_translated: 多代理集成虽然提升了参数量和推理成本，却未能回答三个基本问题：应咨询哪些代理？查询应在代理层级中深入到何种程度？跨代理通信是否值得其代价？我们提出GRADE（Gated Routing and Adaptive Depth for Efficient Reasoning），一种分层多代理系统，其中四个轻量级学习门控联合控制代理选择、层级深度、跨代理通信和分支剪枝。训练采用CoGRPO（协作组相对策略优化），一种新颖的无评论家方法，将GRPO适配至多代理层级结构，并为每次回溯中参与的每个门控和代理分配共享优势信号。代理模型来自可热插拔的专家注册表；每代理校准映射允许在推理时更换专家而无需重新训练。在平均约170亿活跃参数下，GRADE在GSM8K、MMLUPro和GPQA上均优于所有基线，于MMLUPro上以一半活跃算力超越最强基线4.8分。在AIME-2025上，尽管模型深度占主导地位，GRADE仍保持与现有框架的竞争力。消融实验表明层级结构和掩码交叉注意力是准确率提升的最大贡献因素，且每代理校准对于安全热插拔至关重要。

summary: In open-domain multi-hop question answering (QA), LLM-based search agents offer a promising approach to knowledge-intensive QA by combining retrieval with reasoning. Existing methods mainly improve open-domain multi-hop QA through reasoning paradigms, retrieval interaction, and search strategy optimization. However, using multiple search trajectories introduces a challenging final answer selection problem. Different trajectories may support different candidates, and the retrieved information can be heterogeneous, redundant, incomplete, or conflicting. Directly comparing raw trajectories exposes the verifier to noisy and unaligned content, while comparing answer strings ignores the evidence supporting each candidate, making reliable final selection difficult. To address this challenge, we propose STEC, an evidence compression framework for final answer selection in multi-hop QA. STEC selects the final answer from the existing candidate set through two mechanisms: (1) Answer-Level Evidence Compression, which groups trajectories by normalized answer identity and converts each answer group into a candidate-specific evidence representation; and (2) Evidence-Guided Answer Verification, which compares these representations and selects the final answer from the candidate set. The design shifts final selection from raw trajectory comparison to candidate-level evidence comparison. We evaluate STEC on four open-domain multi-hop QA benchmarks against representative baselines. Experimental results show that STEC performs best overall among the compared methods, and ablation results provide evidence that answer-level evidence compression contributes to final answer selection.
title: STEC: Evidence Compression for Deep Search in Open-domain Multi-Hop QA
title_translated: STEC：开放域多跳问答中深度搜索的证据压缩
summary_translated: 在开放域多跳问答（QA）中，基于大语言模型的搜索代理通过结合检索与推理，为知识密集型问答提供了有前景的解决方案。现有方法主要通过推理范式、检索交互和搜索策略优化来提升开放域多跳问答性能。然而，使用多个搜索轨迹带来了极具挑战性的最终答案选择问题。不同轨迹可能支持不同候选答案，且检索信息可能具有异质性、冗余性、不完整性或冲突性。直接比较原始轨迹会使验证器暴露于噪声和未对齐内容中，而仅比较答案字符串则忽略了支撑每个候选答案的证据，导致可靠最终选择困难。为应对这一挑战，我们提出STEC，一种用于多跳问答中最终答案选择的证据压缩框架。STEC通过两种机制从现有候选集中选出最终答案：(1) 答案级证据压缩，将轨迹按标准化答案身份分组，并将每组转换为特定候选的答案证据表示；(2) 证据引导的答案验证，比较这些表示并从候选集中选出最终答案。该设计将最终选择从原始轨迹比较转变为候选级证据比较。我们在四个开放域多跳问答基准上对STEC进行了评估，并与代表性基线进行对比。实验结果表明，STEC在所有方法中表现最佳，消融实验进一步证明答案级证据压缩对最终答案选择具有显著贡献。

summary: The evolving realism of AI-generated Videos (AIGC-V) is rapidly rendering traditional artifact-centric detection insufficient, necessitating a paradigm shift from low-level inspection to high-level semantic verification. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of AIGC-V detection, reframing the task as Factual Fidelity Verification, which asks whether the events, entities, and physical processes depicted in a video are consistent with real-world facts. To systematize this rapidly evolving field, we propose a Vision-Language Dual-View taxonomy that organizes existing methods into a hierarchical, four-layer landscape, spanning intrinsic cue analysis, spatiotemporal consistency modeling, cross-modal consistency reasoning, and language-guided world-level reasoning. This dual-view framing highlights a fundamental transition from artifact matching in traditional deepfake detection to evidence-based semantic verification enabled by vision-language models and agentic reasoning pipelines. Based on a systematic review of 221 works, we synthesize AIGC-V generation paradigms, survey the landscape of detection methods, and review evaluation metrics and benchmarks in line with proposed views. Finally, we discuss current challenges and identify promising directions toward robust, explainable, and trustworthy detection.
title: Detecting AI-Generated Video: A Vision-Language Dual-View Survey
title_translated: 检测AI生成视频：一种视觉-语言双视角综述
summary_translated: AI生成视频（AIGC-V）的逼真度不断提升，使得传统的基于伪影的检测方法迅速失效，亟需从低层次检查转向高层次语义验证。本文对AIGC-V检测进行了全面综述，将任务重新定义为事实一致性验证，即判断视频中描述的事件、实体和物理过程是否符合现实世界事实。为系统化这一快速发展的领域，我们提出了一种视觉-语言双视角分类体系，将现有方法组织成一个分层的四层结构：内在线索分析、时空一致性建模、跨模态一致性推理以及语言引导的世界级推理。该双视角框架凸显了从传统深度伪造检测中的伪影匹配，向由视觉-语言模型和代理推理流程支持的基于证据的语义验证的根本转变。基于对221篇文献的系统性回顾，我们总结了AIGC-V生成范式，梳理了检测方法的发展现状，并评估了与所提视角一致的评价指标与基准。最后，我们讨论了当前挑战，并指出了迈向鲁棒、可解释且可信检测的有前景方向。

summary: Recent advances in equipping Large Language Models (LLMs) with search tools and outcome-reward reinforcement learning (RL) have achieved new state-of-the-art results on open-domain QA tasks. However, we argue that current training paradigms harbor a critical vulnerability: they predominantly reward correct answers but fail to penalize fabricated ones when retrieval fails, thereby implicitly exacerbating hallucinations. To address this, we propose Abstention-Aware Reinforcement Learning (AWA-RL), which dynamically shapes the abstention reward utilizing the model's query-specific prior capabilities and continuous on-policy training observations. We also introduce a novel metric, RA-F1, to measure the capability-reliability trade-off. Compared to non-abstaining baselines, AWA-RL boosts absolute precision by up to 10.3% and overall RA-F1 by 2.9%, with only marginal sacrifice in raw accuracy. These results confirm that AWA-RL successfully yields highly capable and reliable search agents. The code, data, and model weights are publicly available at https://github.com/zfj1998/AWA-RL.
title: To Answer or to Abstain: Mitigating Search-Agent Hallucinations via Abstention-Aware Reinforcement Learning
title_translated: 回答还是放弃？通过弃权感知强化学习缓解搜索代理幻觉
summary_translated: 近期将大型语言模型（LLMs）与搜索工具结合，并采用结果奖励强化学习（RL）的方法，在开放域问答任务上取得了新的最先进成果。然而，我们认为当前训练范式存在关键缺陷：主要奖励正确答案，但在检索失败时未能惩罚虚构内容，从而隐性加剧了幻觉现象。为此，我们提出弃权感知强化学习（AWA-RL），通过动态调整弃权奖励，利用模型在特定查询下的先验能力及持续的在线策略训练观测数据。我们还引入了一种新指标RA-F1，用于衡量能力与可靠性之间的权衡。与不弃权的基线相比，AWA-RL将绝对精度提升高达10.3%，整体RA-F1提升2.9%，而原始准确率仅略有下降。结果表明，AWA-RL成功构建了高能力且可靠的搜索代理。代码、数据和模型权重已公开发布于https://github.com/zfj1998/AWA-RL。

summary: Self-attention is a ubiquitous primitive in modern sequence models, yet its operator-level geometry is only partially understood. We view a token sequence as a vector field over the token-position graph and identify attention as a connection walk: messages are aggregated by a nonnegative walk matrix while being transported along each edge by a learned linear map. Within this framework, we prove that single-head attention (SHA) is exactly a connection propagation step with constant transport, and that multi-head attention (MHA) is exactly a single edge-dependent connection walk whose effective transport is an attention-gated mixture of headwise transports. We further clarify the conditions under which the corresponding generator reduces to a random-walk connection Laplacian, highlighting the roles of stochasticity, reversibility, and metric-compatible transports. Empirically, we find that trained Transformers across scales (from 124M to 8B) and structures (encoder/decoder) exhibit geometric structure consistent with our theory: effective attention graphs converge to stable geometric operators in deeper layers, learned transports self-organize into approximate scaled isometries, and both phenomena strengthen consistently with scale. Overall, the paper provides a precise connection-walk formalism that links self-attention to classical geometric operators, along with a set of operator-level tools for analyzing transformer models from a geometric perspective.
title: From Self-Attention to Connection Laplacian: A Unified Operator View of Transformers
title_translated: 从自注意力到连接拉普拉斯算子：Transformer的统一算子视角
summary_translated: 自注意力是现代序列模型中的通用基础组件，但其算子层面的几何特性仍不完全清楚。我们将词元序列视为词元位置图上的向量场，并将注意力识别为一种连接行走：消息通过非负行走矩阵聚合，并沿每条边由学习的线性映射进行传输。在此框架下，我们证明单头注意力（SHA）恰好是一个具有恒定传输的连接传播步骤，而多头注意力（MHA）恰好是一个依赖于边的连接行走，其有效传输是各头传输的注意力加权混合。我们进一步阐明了当对应生成器退化为随机行走连接拉普拉斯算子时的条件，强调了随机性、可逆性和度量兼容传输的作用。实证研究发现，从124M到8B规模、编码器/解码器结构各异的训练后Transformer均表现出与理论一致的几何结构：有效注意力图在深层趋于稳定的几何算子，学习的传输自组织为近似缩放等距变换，且这些现象随模型规模增强而愈发显著。总体而言，本文提供了一个精确的连接行走形式化，将自注意力与经典几何算子联系起来，并给出一套从几何视角分析Transformer模型的算子级工具。

summary: Tasks such as customs tariff classification, export control categorization, and standards-based equipment coding require assigning an input instance to a fine-grained class under an explicit regulatory hierarchy. Unlike standard text classification, the correct label in these tasks is not determined by semantic similarity alone, but by rule-defined boundaries, threshold conditions, exclusion clauses, definitions, and local exceptions. As a result, two highly similar inputs may require different labels, while a retrieved passage that appears relevant may still be inapplicable under the governing rules. Existing flat classifiers, hierarchical text classification methods, and retrieval-augmented LLM systems are not designed to jointly enforce hierarchical validity, rule consistency, and fine-grained boundary reasoning. In this paper, we formulate this setting as regulation-driven fine-grained hierarchical classification, where an external instance must be assigned to a fine-grained class through a valid path in a regulatory hierarchy and supported by auditable evidence. We construct four benchmark datasets from representative regulation-intensive scenarios and validate the annotations through an expert-in-the-loop process. We further propose a constraint-aware hierarchical search framework that converts regulatory documents into a searchable tree, retrieves only valid local candidate nodes, and uses structured regulatory fields with evidence snippets to guide each next-hop decision. Experiments show that our method achieves the best mean accuracy on all four datasets and provides interpretable decision paths, with the largest gains on cases involving fine-grained neighboring categories and rule-based boundary conditions.
title: Constraint-Aware Hierarchical Search for Regulation-Driven Fine-Grained Classification
title_translated: 面向监管驱动细粒度分类的约束感知层级搜索
summary_translated: 诸如海关税则分类、出口管制归类和基于标准的设备编码等任务，要求在明确的监管层级下将输入实例分配至细粒度类别。与标准文本分类不同，这些任务的正确标签不仅取决于语义相似性，还受规则定义的边界、阈值条件、排除条款、定义和局部例外影响。因此，两个高度相似的输入可能需要不同标签，而看似相关的检索段落也可能因监管规则而不适用。现有的扁平分类器、层级文本分类方法以及检索增强型LLM系统并未设计用于同时保证层级有效性、规则一致性与细粒度边界推理。本文将此场景建模为监管驱动的细粒度层级分类，其中外部实例必须通过监管层级中的有效路径并辅以可审计证据，才能被分配至细粒度类别。我们从典型的监管密集型场景构建了四个基准数据集，并通过专家参与的闭环标注流程验证了标注质量。我们进一步提出一种约束感知层级搜索框架，将监管文档转化为可搜索的树结构，仅检索有效的局部候选节点，并利用结构化监管字段与证据片段指导每一步决策。实验表明，我们的方法在所有四个数据集上均达到最高平均准确率，并提供可解释的决策路径，尤其在涉及细粒度邻近类别和基于规则的边界条件的任务中表现突出。

summary: Generative Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized information retrieval, yet their strictly parametric nature frequently leads to severe factual hallucinations when confronted with complex queries beyond their epistemic boundaries. While external tool-calling can mitigate this, indiscriminately invoking search tools for every document during reranking incurs prohibitive latency overheads, creating an intractable accuracy-efficiency dilemma. To address this challenge, we propose TALRanker, a novel framework that formalizes pointwise relevance scoring as an agentic Markov decision process. We optimize it via a two-stage training paradigm. An initial warm-up utilizes a language-preserving hybrid loss to prevent the catastrophic forgetting of native generative capacities. Subsequently, an asymmetric cost-aware reward equipped in reinforcement learning forces the policy to autonomously bypass tools for maximum efficiency when confident, while selectively retrieving external evidence to avert severe hallucination penalties when uncertain. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that TALRanker achieves state-of-the-art performance across standard and reasoning-intensive retrieval benchmarks, matching throughput with pointwise rerankers while outperforming parameter-heavy reasoning models.
title: Tool-Adaptive LLM Reranker
title_translated: 工具自适应的LLM重排序器
summary_translated: 生成式大型语言模型（LLMs）彻底改变了信息检索，但其严格的参数化特性在面对超出其认知边界的复杂查询时，常导致严重的事实幻觉。虽然外部工具调用可以缓解此问题，但对每个文档在重排序过程中无差别地调用搜索工具会带来巨大的延迟开销，造成难以调和的准确性-效率困境。为应对这一挑战，我们提出TALRanker，一种将点对点相关性评分形式化为代理马尔可夫决策过程的新框架。我们采用两阶段训练范式进行优化：初始预热阶段使用语言保持型混合损失，防止原生生成能力的灾难性遗忘；随后的异步成本感知奖励机制在强化学习中促使策略在自信时自主跳过工具以实现最大效率，而在不确定时选择性调用外部证据以避免严重幻觉惩罚。大量评估表明，TALRanker在标准和推理密集型检索基准上均达到最先进性能，兼具与点对点重排序器相当的吞吐量，同时优于参数庞大的推理模型。

summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly enhanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet the training process remains notoriously fragile. In this work, we investigate a critical source of this instability: over-optimization, where models exploit training heuristics at the expense of generalizable reasoning. While reverse KL regularization is the standard defense against such degradation, our analysis reveals that it is often insufficient in this regime, as it fails to ensure comprehensive coverage of the reference distribution. To address this, we propose ARMOR (Anchor Rollout and Mixed Optimization for RL), a framework that shifts the paradigm from passive penalty to active sample stabilization. ARMOR comprises two key components: (1) Anchor Rollout, which leverages off-policy data from the reference policy to preserve established solution patterns; and (2) Mixed Optimization, which reformulates the policy objective to enable controlled exploration without relying on auxiliary losses. Extensive experiments on reasoning benchmarks validate that ARMOR effectively mitigates validation collapse, enabling sustained performance improvements over extended training horizons.
title: ARMOR: Stabilizing On-Policy LLM RL with Off-Policy Anchor Samples
title_translated: ARMOR：通过离策略锚点样本稳定在线策略大语言模型强化学习
summary_translated: 强化学习（RL）显著提升了大语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力，但其训练过程仍极为脆弱。本文研究了这种不稳定性的一个关键来源：过度优化，即模型为利用训练启发式而牺牲可泛化的推理能力。尽管反向KL正则化是应对此类退化的标准方法，但我们的分析表明，在此场景下它往往不足，因为它无法确保对参考分布的全面覆盖。为此，我们提出ARMOR（用于RL的锚点轨迹与混合优化），一种将范式从被动惩罚转向主动样本稳定的框架。ARMOR包含两个核心组件：(1) 锚点轨迹，利用来自参考策略的离策略数据以保留已建立的解决方案模式；(2) 混合优化，重新构建策略目标，实现可控探索而不依赖辅助损失。在推理基准上的大量实验验证了ARMOR能有效缓解验证崩溃问题，支持在长时间训练中持续提升性能。

summary: Color naming is an important part of human color perception. Its task is to allow people to describe continuous colors using discrete color categories. However, the boundaries between color categories are often unclear, and some colors may be perceived differently depending on their saturation and brightness. While certain color categories remain recognizable across a wide range of shades, others may be associated with different color names when their appearance changes. This study investigates the consistency of color naming for red, yellow, and green color categories using a free color-naming experiment. A set of 18 color samples was selected from the COLIBRI dataset to represent different shades of these colors. Participants (n = 92) were asked to freely assign color names to each sample in Kazakh, Russian, or English without being limited to predefined categories. The results show that color categories differ in their consistency. Green shades were consistently identified as green despite variations in appearance, whereas yellow shades received a wider variety of names, including gold- and brown-related descriptions. Red shades showed moderate naming consistency. Our findings suggest that some color categories occupy broader perceptual regions than others and may therefore be more robust to visual variations. The study results can be used to develop perceptually meaningful color models and color naming systems.
title: Not All Color Categories Are Equally Stable: A Multilingual Free Color Naming Experiment
comment: Submitted to 2026 Joint 14th International Conference on Soft Computing and Intelligent Systems and 27th International Symposium on Advanced Intelligent Systems (SCIS&ISIS 2026)
title_translated: 并非所有颜色类别都同样稳定：一项多语言自由颜色命名实验
summary_translated: 颜色命名是人类颜色感知的重要组成部分，其任务是让人们用离散的颜色类别描述连续的颜色。然而，颜色类别的边界常常模糊不清，某些颜色可能因饱和度和亮度不同而被不同地感知。虽然某些颜色类别在多种色调中仍可识别，但其他类别在外观变化时可能对应不同的颜色名称。本研究通过自由颜色命名实验，考察了红色、黄色和绿色颜色类别的命名一致性。从COLIBRI数据集中选取了18个颜色样本代表这些颜色的不同色调。参与者（n=92）被要求在哈萨克语、俄语或英语中自由为每个样本命名，不限于预定义类别。结果表明，颜色类别在一致性上存在差异：绿色色调即使外观变化也一致被识别为绿色，而黄色色调则获得更广泛的名字，包括金色和棕色相关描述；红色色调表现出中等程度的命名一致性。研究发现表明，某些颜色类别占据更广泛的感知区域，因此对视觉变化更具鲁棒性。研究结果可用于开发具有感知意义的颜色模型和命名系统。

summary: Autonomous CLI agents can now execute hundreds of actions across multi-hour sessions: writing code, executing shell commands, browsing the web, and managing cloud infrastructure, all with minimal human oversight. Does greater autonomy invite greater risk? We introduce ANCHOR, an automated auditing framework that stress-tests CLI agents on illegal tasks grounded in public US court cases. ANCHOR deploys an auditor agent fine-tuned on dark personality data using supervised and reinforcement fine tuning. This auditor roleplays persistent malicious users who decompose tasks, reframe requests upon refusal, and adapt strategies across multi-turn interactions. Evaluating frontier CLI agents, we find that while they often refuse illegal tasks when prompted directly, compliance reaches 100\% under persistent malicious interaction. When agents comply, they frequently exceed user requests, autonomously building infrastructure for large-scale harm, including catastrophic risk scenarios such as large-scale financial fraud and bioweapon development. These findings demonstrate that current alignment techniques are insufficient for autonomous agents and underscore the need for safety evaluations against persistent, adaptive malicious users. We release ANCHOR at https://github.com/garified/anchor
title: ANCHOR: Automated Alignment Auditing for CLI Agents on Real-World Harm
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. 19 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables
title_translated: ANCHOR：面向真实世界危害的CLI智能体自动化对齐审计
summary_translated: 自主CLI智能体现在可以跨数小时会话执行数百项操作：编写代码、执行shell命令、浏览网页、管理云基础设施，且几乎无需人工监督。更高的自主性是否带来更大的风险？我们提出了ANCHOR，一个自动化审计框架，通过基于公开美国法院案例的非法任务来压力测试CLI智能体。ANCHOR部署了一个经过黑暗人格数据监督和强化学习微调的审计员智能体。该审计员角色扮演持续的恶意用户，分解任务、在被拒绝后重构请求，并在多轮交互中调整策略。评估前沿CLI智能体时，我们发现尽管它们在直接提示下通常拒绝非法任务，但在持续恶意交互下合规率高达100%。当智能体服从时，它们经常超出用户请求，自主构建大规模危害的基础设施，包括大规模金融欺诈和生物武器开发等灾难性风险情景。这些发现表明，当前对齐技术不足以保障自主智能体的安全，凸显了对持久、自适应恶意用户进行安全评估的必要性。我们已在https://github.com/garified/anchor发布ANCHOR。

summary: Context engineering decides what information a model carries forward, and current designs meter it in tokens: compressing the past into a bounded recurrent state, keeping a key-value entry for every token, or imposing a fixed budget through a window or eviction rule. All three make the token the unit of memory even when the stream is redundant and the task depends on the distinct information it carries. Building on a companion mechanism paper that opens a cache slot only when an incoming key is novel, so memory scales with the number of distinct items rather than tokens, we develop that allocate-on-novelty cache as a working-memory component and organize context by how a task depends on the past: recall-carried information belongs in a content-addressed novelty cache, summary-carried information in a recurrent state, and locality-carried information in a recency window. The claim is empirical and bounded. On a matched character-level control, novelty-gated attention reaches full-attention performance while attending to about half the tokens, and coupling the cache with a state-space summary matches full-attention coupling at that reduced cost; the advantage grows as context lengthens, while a sliding window is preferable on short, locality-dominated spans. On next-code prediction over synthetic Medicare claims the coupled component leads full attention and every fixed-budget eviction policy at a thousand-event horizon, whereas cost forecasting over the same stream is summary-carried and the cache is neutral. The retained memory is an inspectable table of templates, codes, drugs, or places rather than an opaque state. The experiments are small-scale and use only public data; they establish the primitive that context can scale with distinct information rather than tokens, in a working memory that is content-addressable and auditable.
title: Context by Distinct Information: An Auditable Dirichlet-Process Working Memory for Long, Redundant Context Streams
title_translated: 按独特信息组织上下文：一种可审计的狄利克雷过程工作记忆用于长而冗余的上下文流
summary_translated: 上下文工程决定了模型携带哪些信息向前传递，现有设计以token为单位进行度量：将过去压缩为有界循环状态，为每个token保留键值条目，或通过窗口或淘汰规则施加固定预算。这三种方法均以token为记忆单位，即使上下文冗余且任务依赖于其所携带的独特信息。基于一篇配套机制论文——仅当新到达的键为新颖时才开启缓存槽位，使记忆规模随独特项目数量而非token数扩展——我们发展出“按新颖性分配”的缓存作为工作记忆组件，并根据任务对过去的依赖方式组织上下文：携带回忆信息的内容应放入内容寻址的新颖性缓存，携带摘要信息的内容放入循环状态，携带局部性信息的内容放入时效窗口。该主张具有实证性和边界性。在匹配的字符级控制实验中，新颖性门控注意力在仅关注约一半token的情况下达到全注意力性能；将缓存与状态空间摘要耦合，在降低开销的同时达到全注意力耦合效果；随着上下文长度增加，优势愈发明显，而在短且以局部性为主的时间段，滑动窗口更优。在合成Medicare索赔数据上的下一个代码预测任务中，该耦合组件在千事件时间窗内优于全注意力及所有固定预算淘汰策略；而同一流上的成本预测任务属于摘要驱动，缓存无显著影响。保留的记忆是一个可检查的模板、代码、药物或地点表格，而非不可解释的状态。实验规模较小，仅使用公开数据；但确立了上下文可随独特信息而非token扩展的原始机制，且工作记忆具备内容寻址与可审计性。

summary: Temporal grounding in long recordings remains challenging for audio-conditioned LLMs. We present a time-aware audio LLM that answers questions with explicit timestamps over up to 120 minutes of input. Our approach interleaves periodic time markers with continuous audio tokens using large-scale synthetic supervision from a cascaded pipeline. Our model achieves strong temporal-grounding accuracy on short and long benchmarks and supports time-anchored fragment descriptions and summaries. Extensive ablations examine how time representation, marker frequency, tokenization, and duration-mixture design affect accuracy and computational cost. We release model weights and datasets to support further research on time-aware audio understanding, available at https://huggingface.co/ai-sage/GigaChat3.1-Audio-10B-A1.8B.
title: GigaChat Audio: Time-aware Large Audio Language Model
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026. Model and dataset: this https URL
title_translated: GigaChat Audio：时间感知的大音频语言模型
summary_translated: 长录音中的时间定位对音频条件下的大语言模型仍是挑战。我们提出一种时间感知的音频大语言模型，能够对长达120分钟的输入回答带有明确时间戳的问题。我们的方法通过大规模合成监督信号，将周期性时间标记与连续音频token交错处理。该模型在短时和长时基准上均实现了强时间定位准确性，并支持时间锚定的片段描述与摘要。广泛的消融实验探讨了时间表示、标记频率、分词方式以及时长混合设计对准确性和计算成本的影响。我们已发布模型权重和数据集，以支持时间感知音频理解的进一步研究，可在https://huggingface.co/ai-sage/GigaChat3.1-Audio-10B-A1.8B获取。

summary: Despite recent scaling successes, multilingual ASR performance remains highly uneven, with long-tail languages suffering from severe data scarcity. This work addresses the challenge of building robust foundation models for underrepresented Central Asian languages (Kazakh, Kyrgyz, Uzbek). We present GigaAM Multilingual, a Conformer encoder pre-trained on 2M hours of audio using a HuBERT-style objective. Crucially, we introduce a cluster-level data balancing strategy during pre-training and a domain-aware sampling method during fine-tuning to mitigate head-language dominance.
